sharedPost.text:
Der Kino Mittwoch auf radioYpsilon 

MOVIETIME KW 18/2026

DIE INTRIGANTE GLAMOURWELT DER MODE, AUTORIN ENID BLYTON WIEDER IM KINO UND 2 INTERESSANTE INTERVIEWS 

Vor genau 20 Jahren setzten Meryl Streep und Anne Hathaway neue Masstäbe in Sachen Glanz, Luxus aber auch Machtkämpfe. Nun kehren die beiden inkl neuer Charaktere zurück in DER TEUFEL TRÄGT PRADA 2.

Die Bücher der britischen Kinderbuchautorin wurden schon mehrmals verfilmt, nun erlebt ein weiterer Roman von ihr seine Kinopremiere, DER WUNDERWELTENBAUM.

Seit Jahren ist er einer der bekanntesten Dok Filmer des Landes, Georg Riha. Nun startet sein neuestes Werk in den Kinos. Sie lebt im schönen Weinviertel und hat u.a. schon mehrere Videos für die Feuerwehr gemacht,  Sonja Balazs. Mit beiden konnte Moderatorin Sarah Fuchs ein Gespräch führen. 

Musikalisch gibts diesmal ein best of der bekanntesten Filmsongs der letzten 80 Jahre. 

Mittwoch 29.4.2026 von 18 bis 19h auf radioYpsilon 94.5 oder via Stream (http://mp3.radioypsilon.at:8000/)

items.text:
CASTING CALL - SPANISH ACTRESSES
Hi, I’m Lucia, a Spanish film student in Berlin, planning my upcoming bachelor project, and I’m looking for a two Spanish actresses to collaborate with.

ABOUT THE FILM:

‘Las cosas se mueven en mi casa’ (‘Things are moving in my house’) is a B.A. graduation short film directed by Lucía Gil (www.luciagildp.com). It stems from the feeling of ‘in-betweenness’ that a young Spanish woman feels in Berlin - not fully feeling at home in Germany, but losing the anchor to her Spanish family, as she spends more time apart from them.

ABOUT THE ROLES:

- Abril (main role): 20-28 y/o

- Pilar (Abril’s mother): 50-70 y/o

NATIVE SPANISH IS REQUIRED.

PROJECT INFOS:

Shooting dates: 2-3 days between 1st-11th June

This is a no-budget student film, unpaid. 

Food and drinks will be provided on set, as well as good vibes 🙂

The film will be submitted to festivals.

If you are interested in one of the roles, please text me ! luciagilsuarez@gmail.com or @filmbylusi (ig).🫶🏼

items.text:
**CASTING CALL - CINEMATIC ARTS PROD 3 PHANTOM PAIN**

*Synopsis: After bodybuilder, Javier, breaks his arm and has to have it amputated, The Arm crawls off on a journey of its own, and after some searching, finds and attaches to Ronnie. Javier, still able to feel the arm moving, tries everything he can to either get The Arm back or move past it so he can compete to be the Juiciest Man Around. Eventually, after failing in every aspect and seeing The Arm thrive with Ronnie, Javier realizes he has to feel in order to heal. *

We had some last minute drop-outs and really need to fill our track and field team! We are filming at Harvard Gulch Park and your call time would be 4:30 PM.

Attached is a google form to fill out if you're available so we will be able to send you more information and a call sheet! 

https://forms.gle/NKksgUYCrZn38W5N9

THANK YOU IN ADVANCE!!

items.text:
**CASTING CALL: COLORADO FEATURE FILM **

When two estranged brothers — one a straight gun enthusiast, one a trans experimental theater performer — separately flee to their childhood Colorado cabin, they find they can't escape the law, each other, or the question neither has been willing to ask: can you love someone you don't understand? 

Brothers is a socially charged film about freedom, stereotypes, and  brotherly love — with a little wit, gunfire, and whimsy.

Writer + Director: Jordan Kraft Lambert

Executive Producers: Jordan Kraft Lambert + Barnfly Productions

Producer and Casting Director: Jordan Kraft Lambert

Director of Photography: John Barnhardt

Shooting Dates: 7/18 - 7/31

Locations: Red Feather Colorado, Fort Morgan Colorado

Check out our website for a sense of the vibe and message here: [https://onedaychiorcolorado.my.canva.site/brothersmoviewebsite](https://onedaychiorcolorado.my.canva.site/brothersmoviewebsite)

**ROLES:**

**Liam ***Lead*

30-39 / Trans Man

Liam is a mid 30s trans man who fled to Colorado after anti-trans legislation passed in Kansas. Assuming the family skiing cabin would be empty in the height of summer after his father’s death, he posts up there to reconnect with himself, train to hike the continental divide, and finish preparing a moth costume for his theatrical debut in Montana. He has deep commitment issues, a degree in theater, and an irrational connection to a potted plant. He didn’t plan on his brother showing up to the cabin with the law on his tail. 

Performers who bring their own experience of gender, family estrangement, and chosen community will be prioritized. Emotional range includes controlled restraint to tender warmth. Comfort with driving on set and prop firearms are required.
* Rate: ~$4,000 Project Flat
* Duration: Rehearsals in June after 5pm, ~14 Days on Set 
* Shooting Dates: 7/18 - 7/31, Red Feather Colorado, food and housing included
* On-screen driving: Valid drivers license required
* On-screen gun use: all firearms will be set-safe props 

**Jake ***Lead*

30-39 / Cis Man

Jake is a mid 30s cis man on the run from government goons. In an attempt to get out of town and clear his head, he flees to his childhood cabin in the Colorado mountains, not suspecting the sibling who abandoned him to cold and distant parents when he was teenager would already be there. A construction worker by trade whose brawling has gotten him into trouble more than once, he’s built a moat of masculine conformity around himself and only feels safe with a gun (or six) nearby. 

Performers who bring their own experience of family estrangement, blue collar culture, and LGBTQ allyship will be prioritized. Emotional range includes controlled aggression to honest tenderness. Comfort with driving on set and prop firearms are required.
* Rate: ~$4,000 Project Flat
* Duration: Rehearsals in June after 5pm, ~14 Days on Set 
* Shooting Dates: 7/18 - 7/31, Red Feather Colorado, food and housing included
* On-screen driving: Valid drivers license required
* On-screen gun use: all firearms will be set-safe props 

Apply at this link: [[https://forms.gle/XSYTBgjRh5WX9Jdb6](https://forms.gle/XSYTBgjRh5WX9Jdb6)](https://forms.gle/XSYTBgjRh5WX9Jdb6?fbclid=IwZXh0bgNhZW0CMTAAYnJpZBExcEprSDdpTGZWbHNPaFZjTnNydGMGYXBwX2lkEDIyMjAzOTE3ODgyMDA4OTIAAR5bwkIDBI4h67uz3Ug7J_FnFwfx6Qx5Tnff0_dUx-AUskG4--0oHktKo_lKRA_aem_fD4W7t_GhiiOSjs82_C9VA)

**Melody ***Supporting*

25-60 / Any gender with drag queen energy 

Melody is Liam’s best friend, and she is magnificent. Glamorous, funny, and deeply principled, she leads the queer cavalry into the warehouse with queenly authority and zero hesitation. She is warm to Liam in the way of found family — no conditions, no questions, just presence. She and Declan recognize each other instantly in the parking lot: two people who showed up for exactly the same reason. They walk in together, side by side, in slow motion. She is a showstopper in every scene she’s in.

Strong comedic presence and warm queenly energy. Comfort with ensemble action sequences and prop firearms. 

* Rate: ~$300 Project Flat
* Duration: 2 remote rehearsals in June after 5pm, 1 Day on Set 
* Shooting Dates: 7/25
* On-screen driving: Valid drivers license required
* On-screen gun use: all firearms will be set-safe props 

Apply at this link: [[https://forms.gle/XSYTBgjRh5WX9Jdb6](https://forms.gle/XSYTBgjRh5WX9Jdb6)](https://forms.gle/XSYTBgjRh5WX9Jdb6?fbclid=IwZXh0bgNhZW0CMTAAYnJpZBExcEprSDdpTGZWbHNPaFZjTnNydGMGYXBwX2lkEDIyMjAzOTE3ODgyMDA4OTIAAR5bwkIDBI4h67uz3Ug7J_FnFwfx6Qx5Tnff0_dUx-AUskG4--0oHktKo_lKRA_aem_fD4W7t_GhiiOSjs82_C9VA)

 **Declan ***Supporting*

30-60 / Cis Man

Declan is Jake’s blue-collar buddy who shows up, no questions asked, with a convoy of trucks behind him. He is steady, laconic, and genuinely good. When he meets Melody in the parking lot, he assesses the situation in about four seconds and makes a plan to join forces with the queer cavalry. His walk into the warehouse alongside Melody is one of the film’s key images.

Physical ease and natural authority. Comfort with ensemble action sequences and prop firearms. 
* Rate: ~$300 Project Flat
* Duration: 2 remote rehearsals in June after 5pm, 1 Day on Set 
* Shooting Dates: 7/25
* On-screen driving: Valid drivers license required
* On-screen gun use: all firearms will be set-safe props 

Apply at this link: [[https://forms.gle/XSYTBgjRh5WX9Jdb6](https://forms.gle/XSYTBgjRh5WX9Jdb6)](https://forms.gle/XSYTBgjRh5WX9Jdb6?fbclid=IwZXh0bgNhZW0CMTAAYnJpZBExcEprSDdpTGZWbHNPaFZjTnNydGMGYXBwX2lkEDIyMjAzOTE3ODgyMDA4OTIAAR5bwkIDBI4h67uz3Ug7J_FnFwfx6Qx5Tnff0_dUx-AUskG4--0oHktKo_lKRA_aem_fD4W7t_GhiiOSjs82_C9VA)

**The Queer Cavalry ***Supporting*

25-60 / LGBTQIA+ Community Members

Eleven queers dressed for maximum ego expression pile out of five Subarus join forces with a crew of blue collar men to rescue someone they've never met — because Liam asked, and that's enough. This is the image the film has been building toward: a group of people who have every cultural reason to stay out of it, choosing not to.

We are looking for performers who bring their full selves to this. Drag queens, trans and nonbinary performers, queer folks of every flavor — if this community is yours, we want you in this scene. Strong energy and warmth, physical confidence, comfort in a crowd, and a willingness to handle non-functional prop firearms are the primary requirements. An acceptance of the blue-collar crew arriving in the same parking lot is necessary. If you believe no one is free until we’re all free, this role is for you. 
* Rate: ~$200 Project Flat
* Duration: 2 remote rehearsals in June after 5pm, 1 Day on Set 
* Shooting Dates: 7/25
* On-screen driving: Valid drivers license required
* On-screen gun use: all firearms will be set-safe props 

Apply at this link: [[https://forms.gle/XSYTBgjRh5WX9Jdb6](https://forms.gle/XSYTBgjRh5WX9Jdb6)](https://forms.gle/XSYTBgjRh5WX9Jdb6?fbclid=IwZXh0bgNhZW0CMTAAYnJpZBExcEprSDdpTGZWbHNPaFZjTnNydGMGYXBwX2lkEDIyMjAzOTE3ODgyMDA4OTIAAR5bwkIDBI4h67uz3Ug7J_FnFwfx6Qx5Tnff0_dUx-AUskG4--0oHktKo_lKRA_aem_fD4W7t_GhiiOSjs82_C9VA)

**Blue Collar Crew ***Supporting*

25 - 60 / Straight Men

Eleven blue-collar workers pile out of their trucks and join forces with a cavalry of queers to walk to rescue someone they'd do anything for — because Jake is one of their own, and that's all they need to know. This is the image the film has been building toward: a group of people who have every cultural reason to keep their heads down, choosing not to.

We are looking for performers who feel lived-in and real. Construction workers, tradespeople, outdoorsmen — if this world is yours, or close to it, we want you in this scene. Physical confidence, comfort in a crowd, and a willingness to handle non-functional prop firearms are the primary requirements. An acceptance of the queer cavalry arriving in the same parking lot is necessary. If you believe no one is free until we’re all free, this role is for you. 
* Rate: ~$200 Project Flat
* Duration: 2 remote rehearsals in June after 5pm, 1 Day on Set 
* Shooting Dates: 7/25
* On-screen driving: Valid drivers license required
* On-screen gun use: all firearms will be set-safe props 

Apply at this link: [[https://forms.gle/XSYTBgjRh5WX9Jdb6](https://forms.gle/XSYTBgjRh5WX9Jdb6)](https://forms.gle/XSYTBgjRh5WX9Jdb6?fbclid=IwZXh0bgNhZW0CMTAAYnJpZBExcEprSDdpTGZWbHNPaFZjTnNydGMGYXBwX2lkEDIyMjAzOTE3ODgyMDA4OTIAAR5bwkIDBI4h67uz3Ug7J_FnFwfx6Qx5Tnff0_dUx-AUskG4--0oHktKo_lKRA_aem_fD4W7t_GhiiOSjs82_C9VA)

**The Goons ***Supporting*

30 - 50 / Men

Four men, broadly menacing, are the government henchmen sent to kidnap Jake. They are hired for violence, but are more invested in their spades game than in their hostage. They bicker about reneging, argue about counting, and nearly miss Jake’s escape because one slammed a jack at the wrong moment.

Character work and comedic timing are essential. The Head Goon in particular sets the tone: quietly authoritative at the card table, supremely unbothered by everything else happening around him.

Strong ensemble instincts. Ability to make a card game feel tense and funny at the same time. Comfort with prop firearms.
* Rate: ~$400 Project Flat
* Duration: 2 remote rehearsals in June after 5pm, 2 Days on Set 
* Shooting Dates: 7/25 - 7/26
* On-screen driving: Valid drivers license required
* On-screen gun use: all firearms will be set-safe props 

Apply at this link: [[https://forms.gle/XSYTBgjRh5WX9Jdb6](https://forms.gle/XSYTBgjRh5WX9Jdb6)](https://forms.gle/XSYTBgjRh5WX9Jdb6?fbclid=IwZXh0bgNhZW0CMTAAYnJpZBExcEprSDdpTGZWbHNPaFZjTnNydGMGYXBwX2lkEDIyMjAzOTE3ODgyMDA4OTIAAR5bwkIDBI4h67uz3Ug7J_FnFwfx6Qx5Tnff0_dUx-AUskG4--0oHktKo_lKRA_aem_fD4W7t_GhiiOSjs82_C9VA)

—------------------

Thank you for your interest in our project! Apply at this link: [[https://forms.gle/XSYTBgjRh5WX9Jdb6](https://forms.gle/XSYTBgjRh5WX9Jdb6)](https://forms.gle/XSYTBgjRh5WX9Jdb6?fbclid=IwZXh0bgNhZW0CMTAAYnJpZBExcEprSDdpTGZWbHNPaFZjTnNydGMGYXBwX2lkEDIyMjAzOTE3ODgyMDA4OTIAAR5bwkIDBI4h67uz3Ug7J_FnFwfx6Qx5Tnff0_dUx-AUskG4--0oHktKo_lKRA_aem_fD4W7t_GhiiOSjs82_C9VA)

Check out our website for more information here: [https://onedaychiorcolorado.my.canva.site/brothersmoviewebsite](https://onedaychiorcolorado.my.canva.site/brothersmoviewebsite)

A socially charged film about freedom, stereotypes, and brotherly love with a little wit, gunfire, and whimsy.'

**The Queer Cavalry ***Supporting*

25-60 / LGBTQIA+ Community Members

Eleven queers dressed for maximum ego expression pile out of five Subarus join forces with a crew of blue collar men to rescue someone they've never met — because Liam asked, and that's enough. This is the image the film has been building toward: a group of people who have every cultural reason to stay out of it, choosing not to.

We are looking for performers who bring their full selves to this. Drag queens, trans and nonbinary performers, queer folks of every flavor — if this community is yours, we want you in this scene. Strong energy and warmth, physical confidence, comfort in a crowd, and a willingness to handle non-functional prop firearms are the primary requirements. An acceptance of the blue-collar crew arriving in the same parking lot is necessary. If you believe no one is free until we’re all free, this role is for you. 
* Rate: ~$200 Project Flat
* Duration: 2 remote rehearsals in June after 5pm, 1 Day on Set 
* Shooting Dates: 7/25
* On-screen driving: Valid drivers license required
* On-screen gun use: all firearms will be set-safe props 

Apply at this link: [[https://forms.gle/XSYTBgjRh5WX9Jdb6](https://forms.gle/XSYTBgjRh5WX9Jdb6)](https://forms.gle/XSYTBgjRh5WX9Jdb6?fbclid=IwZXh0bgNhZW0CMTAAYnJpZBExcEprSDdpTGZWbHNPaFZjTnNydGMGYXBwX2lkEDIyMjAzOTE3ODgyMDA4OTIAAR5bwkIDBI4h67uz3Ug7J_FnFwfx6Qx5Tnff0_dUx-AUskG4--0oHktKo_lKRA_aem_fD4W7t_GhiiOSjs82_C9VA)

**Blue Collar Crew ***Supporting*

25 - 60 / Straight Men

Eleven blue-collar workers pile out of their trucks and join forces with a cavalry of queers to walk to rescue someone they'd do anything for — because Jake is one of their own, and that's all they need to know. This is the image the film has been building toward: a group of people who have every cultural reason to keep their heads down, choosing not to.

We are looking for performers who feel lived-in and real. Construction workers, tradespeople, outdoorsmen — if this world is yours, or close to it, we want you in this scene. Physical confidence, comfort in a crowd, and a willingness to handle non-functional prop firearms are the primary requirements. An acceptance of the queer cavalry arriving in the same parking lot is necessary. If you believe no one is free until we’re all free, this role is for you. 
* Rate: ~$200 Project Flat
* Duration: 2 remote rehearsals in June after 5pm, 1 Day on Set 
* Shooting Dates: 7/25
* On-screen driving: Valid drivers license required
* On-screen gun use: all firearms will be set-safe props 

Apply at this link: [[https://forms.gle/XSYTBgjRh5WX9Jdb6](https://forms.gle/XSYTBgjRh5WX9Jdb6)](https://forms.gle/XSYTBgjRh5WX9Jdb6?fbclid=IwZXh0bgNhZW0CMTAAYnJpZBExcEprSDdpTGZWbHNPaFZjTnNydGMGYXBwX2lkEDIyMjAzOTE3ODgyMDA4OTIAAR5bwkIDBI4h67uz3Ug7J_FnFwfx6Qx5Tnff0_dUx-AUskG4--0oHktKo_lKRA_aem_fD4W7t_GhiiOSjs82_C9VA)

**The Goons ***Supporting*

30 - 50 / Men

Four men, broadly menacing, are the government henchmen sent to kidnap Jake. They are hired for violence, but are more invested in their spades game than in their hostage. They bicker about reneging, argue about counting, and nearly miss Jake’s escape because one slammed a jack at the wrong moment.

Character work and comedic timing are essential. The Head Goon in particular sets the tone: quietly authoritative at the card table, supremely unbothered by everything else happening around him.

Strong ensemble instincts. Ability to make a card game feel tense and funny at the same time. Comfort with prop firearms.
* Rate: ~$400 Project Flat
* Duration: 2 remote rehearsals in June after 5pm, 2 Days on Set 
* Shooting Dates: 7/25 - 7/26
* On-screen driving: Valid drivers license required
* On-screen gun use: all firearms will be set-safe props 

Apply at this link: [[https://forms.gle/XSYTBgjRh5WX9Jdb6](https://forms.gle/XSYTBgjRh5WX9Jdb6)](https://forms.gle/XSYTBgjRh5WX9Jdb6?fbclid=IwZXh0bgNhZW0CMTAAYnJpZBExcEprSDdpTGZWbHNPaFZjTnNydGMGYXBwX2lkEDIyMjAzOTE3ODgyMDA4OTIAAR5bwkIDBI4h67uz3Ug7J_FnFwfx6Qx5Tnff0_dUx-AUskG4--0oHktKo_lKRA_aem_fD4W7t_GhiiOSjs82_C9VA)

—------------------

Thank you for your interest in our project! Apply at this link: [[https://forms.gle/XSYTBgjRh5WX9Jdb6](https://forms.gle/XSYTBgjRh5WX9Jdb6)](https://forms.gle/XSYTBgjRh5WX9Jdb6?fbclid=IwZXh0bgNhZW0CMTAAYnJpZBExcEprSDdpTGZWbHNPaFZjTnNydGMGYXBwX2lkEDIyMjAzOTE3ODgyMDA4OTIAAR5bwkIDBI4h67uz3Ug7J_FnFwfx6Qx5Tnff0_dUx-AUskG4--0oHktKo_lKRA_aem_fD4W7t_GhiiOSjs82_C9VA)

Check out our website for more information here: [https://onedaychiorcolorado.my.canva.site/brothersmoviewebsite](https://onedaychiorcolorado.my.canva.site/brothersmoviewebsite)

Estill Voice Training – Level 1 🎶
Heute tauchen wir tief ein in die faszinierende Welt der Stimme 🤩
• Stimmlippen & ihre Schwingung 🎵

sharedPost.text:
Zum Nachhören

Seit Jahren ist er einer der bekanntesten Dokumentar-Filmer des Landes, mit einer unüberschaubaren Liste von – auch jeder Menge – internationalen Produktionen, sodaß man ihn eigentlich gar nicht mehr vorstellen muß: Georg Riha.

Im Gespräch mit Sarah Fuchs erzählt er aus erster Hand wie sich wie seine Produktionen Form annehmen und wie sich die Arbeit und Möglichkeiten über die Jahre  geändert haben, auch am Beispiel des aktuellsten Dok-Films, der gerade in den Kinos startet:  Über Österreich

items.title: Special Guest: Georg Riha

items.text:
# **URGENT CASTING CALL **

Hi! 

Looking for a LOCAL actor to play the male role of a couple in a heated argument for a student film. 

Male, Aged 25-50, filming 28th-29th April. In Portsmouth UK.

Role is UNPAID. Will be paying for lunch for actors (both for break and for in the film). Will compensate for travel but will prioritise actors who are closer (within an hour or two of Portsmouth UK). 

Will give access to the film for use in portfolios/reels.

If interested get in touch ***asap ***so we can see an audition tape! (script of your choice, just one we can see you arguing). 

Help would be massively appreciated!!!!!!

items.text:
🚨CASTING CALL – FEATURE FILM (NON-UNION, ATL)
Synopsis

A romantic drama that follows the lives of Tay and Ted from when they meet at 6 years old, to their adult lives as they navigate life’s obstacles without letting it tear them apart.

SVS Productions 

Non-Union

Shoot Dates: June 5th-10th, 2026

Compensation: Copy/Credit/Meals

Location: Atlanta, GA

Local Atlanta hires only.

Submission Deadline: May 6th, 2026

Available Roles:

TAY CAMERON – LEAD

Black female, ages 25–35 (must be able to portray ages 18–30 throughout the film).

Beautiful, prissy, and driven. Tay knows exactly what she wants for her future, but struggles to balance her career ambitions with her relationship.

Please note: This role includes kissing pecks with the character Ted. No full make-out scenes.

TED BURGESS – LEAD

Black male, ages 25–35, 5’10” and over.

Very caring and loving. Ted deeply loves Tay but is growing tired of her consistently putting her career before their relationship.

Please note: This role includes kissing pecks with Tay. No full make-out scenes.

YOUNG TED BURGESS – SUPPORTING

Black male, age 6-10. 

Ted meets Tay at this age and they develop a bond. He is caring and charismatic. 

SANDRA – SUPPORTING

Black female, ages 40–50.

Ted’s mother. Outgoing, confident, and sexy.

LOGAN – SUPPORTING

Black male, ages 40–50.

Sandra’s husband. Well-dressed, educated, and polished.

GRANNY – SUPPORTING

Black female, ages 60–75.

Logan’s mother and Ted’s grandmother. She helped raise Ted and played a major role in shaping him into the gentleman he is today.

Submission Instructions

Please submit headshot, resume, reel & or demo clips (if available) to: miles@svsmobb.com. Subject Line: [Role Name] Submission

Break a leg!
items.previewDescription: SVS Productions is a Multi-Media company that specializes in creating DOPE content for the world.

items.text:
Vertical
Hey, temperature check:

Are there any Black/Latino actors and actresses in New York City, ages 20–45, with strong comedy chops who’d be interested in doing a vertical indie project?

Looking to shoot in May/June. This is an unpaid indie opportunity, working with experienced filmmakers. Seeking performers with sharp timing, personality, and comfort carrying comedy-driven material.

Great for actors looking to build material, collaborate, and create something fun.

If that’s you or you know someone great, drop a comment and I will DM you

items.text:
**ROLE FILLED**

RUSH CASTING CALL - Student Film
(Non union or union okay)

Tomorrow, May 2nd in La Mirada ($20 gas stipend) 8AM
Sunday, May 3rd in North Hollywood
COPY, CREDITS, BREAKFAST & LUNCH

RYAN - Lead supporting character. Age 25-35, male, a creative freelancer, super caring and sweet towards his long-term partner Emily but has felt a distance growing in their relationship. He goes to therapy but struggles to talk to others. Open to any ethnicity.

About the film:
When a stressed workaholic becomes invisible during her chaotic morning commute, she drifts through a world that no longer registers her existence and is forced to reconsider what she’s been missing in plain sight.

If interested in collaborating, please email  sarahniver@gmail.com with your name and contact info along with your reel and headshots. Thank you so much!

items.text:
BACKGROUND ACTORS NEEDED - NON UNION CASTING CALL
My name is Sanvi Bhardwaj and I am the producer of the student led short film called Method of Madness. I am hosting an open casting call that is looking for **NON UNION ACTORS **to be *background cast* in our project which will be filming on **MAY 20. **Exact call times for background cast is TBD however, we would need you to keep your entire day available until the exact times are confirmed.

The background cast are bar patrons who are seated in the bar. 

The background we are looking for:

-any ethnicity

-non-union

-available all day on May 20th 2026

The deadline for submissions to our email is **May 04** **2026** @ 11:59PM.

Method of Madness is written to explore the pressure within the acting world to perform masculinity in extreme ways. The story critiques the idea that vulnerability in men must be expressed through aggression or intensity rather than emotional honesty. Through Jeremy’s descent into method acting, the film asks an important question: when does dedication to art become destructive to the people around us?

SYNOPSIS: Jeremy Leonard and his wife Naomi are ecstatic when he books his breakout role in a feature playing a deranged serial killer. The two hoping the film will bring them closer to their dream of a family. However, Jeremy immerses himself in the role, and dedication turns into obsession as he chooses to go method. As his erratic and violent behaviour towards his wife increases so does the critical acclaim of his film. Leaving Naomi stuck between two versions of her husband. The instant global sensation, the killer that made him famous.

Please provide your introduction of who you are, headshots, and demo reel/portfolio to our email.

Please send your information to our email: **methodofmadness.shortfilm@gmail.com **and follow us on Instagram @methodofmadness.shortfilm !

Please note that this set will be **unpaid** however, crafty will be on set. You are still expected to bring your own lunch as crafty is not substitute for a meal. We hope to hear from you :)

items.text:
🎬 CASTING CALL – VANCOUVER - PAID
We’re currently casting for a Kickstarter commercial shoot and looking for:

• Male talent (right-handed preferred)

• Comfortable working with hands-on tools on camera

• Natural, confident presence on screen

📅 Shoot date: May 6

⏱ Duration: Full day (approx. 8 hours)

💰 Rate: $300/day

⸻

Project details:

We’ll be filming a craft cutting tool used for precise, hands-on work (cutting materials like leather, wood, etc.).

This is a hands-focused shoot, so it’s important that you feel comfortable performing simple cutting actions on camera.

📩 How to apply:

If you feel like you’d be a good fit, please leave a comment or send me a message with your demo reel/portfolio — I’ll share more details.

Feel free to share if you know someone who fits 🙌

I added some references of what we will be creating to provide some clarity

topComments.text: If you need help in set dec or props or paint. Let me know, i have experience by working on different theatre shows. Albeit Non union
I’ll send in an application. I’m a tradesman (primarily Carpentry) and have done acting in the past.

sharedPost.text:
Hello everyone!

**Location: Poland, Lublin**

Exhibition **June 6-7**

I'm looking for **actors** for a performance. A** slim woman of any age**, preferably an actress with no allergies to body paint.

Terms: **TFP**

This isn't a commercial art project. In exchange for participating, I can take a few professional, classic photos for your portfolio for free.

Examples of past performances from my exhibitions can be found in the attached photos.

items.text:
**013 Mini serial 1940 historyczny z elementami fantazy**

** **

**Poszukujemy szefa organizacji   Ahnenerbe Starszego Pułkownika SS**

** **

 

Nasza Gliwicka Grupa Pasjonatów **‘’Grupa1940’’ **szuka mężczyzny do roli głównego szefa organizacji Ahnenerbe która poszukuje skarbu templariuszy i artefaktu o Boskich mocach. Najlepiej jakby kandydat miał **od 40 – 60 lat o wzroście 170 i szczupłej sylwetce bez zarostu na twarzy** **z surowym spojrzeniem.** Wszystkie kwestie będą mówione po niemiecku dla lepszego efektu filmu. Szukamy kogoś z Gliwic lub okolic: Zabrze, Katowice najdalej (osoby dalsza nie będą brane pod uwagę). Same zdjęcia będą realizowane na terenie Gliwic. **Prosimy o wysłanie aktualnych zdjęć** gdyż tylko takowe zgłoszenia będą rozpatrywane. Szukamy kogoś z Gliwic lub okolic: Zabrze, Katowice najdalej gdyż odległość do tej roli ma znaczenie, jest to ważny czynnik w wyborze kandydata jak również doświadczenie aktorskie ( nie koniecznie duże ). Same zdjęcia będą realizowane na terenie Gliwic.  Postać szefa Ahnenerbe pojawi się w kilku odcinkach. Plan zdjęciowy mamy 09.05.26 ( Sobota ) godz. 17.00 – 22.00

 

**PETER KOCH - **niemiecki nazista, szef grupy ekspedycyjnej Ahnenerbe. Z wyglądu typowy niemiec o blond włosach. Zawsze chodzi elegancko ubrany. Jego prawą ręką jest Elke Meier kobieta zimna i wyrachowana. Peter nigdy nie rozstaje się ze swoją walizką, w której ma szereg ważnych dokumentów i danych z jego wypraw ekspedycyjnych. Nie ufa nikomu dlatego wszystko co bardzo ważne przechowuje właśnie w tej walizce. Sam osobiście udaje się do Himmlera aby poinformować o ostatnim tropie pewnego ważnego artefaktu, który może dać władze nazistom nad światem.

** **

** **

**Od kwietnia 2026 zaczęliśmy realizacje zdjęć do tego **projektu. Mini serial jest oparty o wątki grupy okultystycznej ’’**Ahnenerbe’**’ która chce zdobyć słynne artefakty ale w tym ktoś im chce przeszkadzać. Projekt będzie  się składać z 6 odcinków po 10/12 minut każdy. Będziemy też sukcesywnie dodawać inne ogłoszenia związane z tym projektem. Mile widziane zdjęcia aktualne. Na zdjęciu powyżej osoba będzie mieć podobny kostium.** **Umieszczone materiały są z naszej sesji.** Nie będzie to zlecenie płatne.**

 

Więcej informacji na Priv

 

**Serial nie jest stworzony z sympatii do tej nazistowskiej organizacji lecz wynika to z samego scenariusza aby ukazał zbrodnie i sam fakt iż była w pełni zła. W produkcji znajdą się osoby, które będą chcieć walczyć i potępiać te wielkie zło jakim był nazizm. W oparciu o Dz.U.2017.0.2204 t.j. - Ustawa z dnia 6 czerwca 1997 r. - Kodeks karny,Art. 256 "Propagowanie faszyzmu lub innego ustroju totalitarnego lub nawoływanie domnienawiści", §3 - nie narusza prawa proponując przedmiot do celów historycznych lub kolekcjonerskich.**

attachments.ocrText: May be an image of text that says 'Materiały Materialywiasne"Grupa1940 własne Grupa1940" Gliwice Gliwice2025 2025'

items.title: Hallo!

items.text:
Rotten Apple Productions 🍏
Hi everyone! Hope we're all having a good weekend 🙌🏻

If you haven't heard of us yet, we're Rotten Apple Productions based in Leeds, Yorkshire; we self produce short films - using each project as an opportunity to learn, grow, and develop further to improve the next project! 🎥 

We've been making short films for three years now; but we still have so much more improving to do

And we'd love you to be a part of our journey! As we grow and improve we release our projects, and additional content, onto our YouTube platform, so we can build our audience whilst we do 🙏🏻

We're currently in between projects, but we'd appreciate if you subscribed to our YouTube channel to support us in the meantime 🤍💚

So if independent filmmaking, short films, and storytelling interests you, help us out by subscribing to us!

Thank you to all those reading this

Rotten Apple Productions 🍏

items.previewDescription: A gripping stage play where love, faith, and frustration go on trial — and the audience becomes the jury.

sharedPost.text:
What happens when love, faith, and frustration end up in court?

Why Didn’t I Get Married? is a gripping new stage play where a group of women take the church to trial ⚖️ and the audience becomes the jury.

Expect raw testimony, humour, tension, and a story that hits close to home.

📆 Sun 24 May 2026

items.text:
CASTING CALL – STUDENT SHORT FILM 🎬
We are looking for actors to be part of an exciting Afrikaans short film for a student production.

🎥 Project Type: Short Film

🗣 Language: Afrikaans

Roles:

We are casting for Afrikaans-speaking male characters. Due to the story and character backgrounds, these roles are written for Caucasian actors.

Requirements:

• Male actors

• Fluent in Afrikaans

• Passion for acting (experience is a bonus, not required)

This is a great opportunity to gain on-set experience and build your portfolio.

If you’re interested or know someone who might fit the roles, please get in touch for more details.

items.text:
🎥 CASTING CALL – VOLUNTEER ACTORS WANTED (Johannesburg soweto)
Hello everyone 👋
My name is Karabelo and I am currently starting a small independent YouTube filmmaking project. I am looking for people who are interested in acting in a short film for experience and creativity.
This is not a paid job — it is a voluntary opportunity for anyone who wants to gain acting experience, be part of a creative project, and appear in a YouTube short film.
🎭 No acting experience is needed — beginners are welcome.
🎬 You will be guided during filming and helped with your lines.
FRO MORE INFORMATION 
WHATSAPP NUMBER::60 883 6584 
You can also call 📞

sharedPost.text:
⚓ MALE DANCERS: ELEVATE YOUR CAREER AT SEA! ⚓
Are you a professionally trained Male Dancer with exceptional technique and a strong background in Classical Ballet and Contemporary? Ready to trade the studio for a stage that sails the world?

We are seeking polished and versatile male dancers to join our elite theatre ensembles on luxury cruise ships! This is your opportunity to perform in spectacular, high-energy productions while exploring global destinations.

The Spotlight Awaits:
Lead Performer in lavish theatre shows, dinner shows, special events, and high-impact pool shows.

Execute complex, fast-paced choreography with precision across multiple styles including Ballet, Modern, and Jazz.

Depending on suitability, integrate specialty artistic elements or routines (e.g., floor work or basic aerials) into the company's show formats.

Collaborate with the artistic team to create thrilling new performance pieces.

What We Are Looking For:
Exceptional Training: Completed certified performing arts training or similar professional qualification.

Classical Foundation: Strong professional training in Ballet, Modern, and Jazz dancing is essential.

Experience: Several years of professional stage production experience is highly desirable.

Versatility: Ability to learn choreography quickly and precisely; basic singing and acting training are a plus.

Language: Must be proficient in both spoken and written English.

Attitude: Highly motivated, a reliable team player, and focused on providing a world-class guest experience.

Don't let this opportunity sail by! Audition for a life-changing contract today.

🔗 View the full job description and APPLY NOW: https://www.5entertain.com/jobs/dancers-for-cruise-ships

#maledancer #dancerlife #CruiseShipPerformer #ballet #contemporarydance #jobsatsea #ApplyNow

items.text:
** Limited Actor + Model Headshot Sessions (Downtown LA – First Come First Serve)**

We’re opening up a very limited set of professional headshot sessions designed specifically for actors, models, and creatives looking to update their portfolio, casting profiles, and branding images.

This is part of our community's mission to **make professional creative resources more accessible to underserved and emerging talent**, while still maintaining industry-level quality.

First come, first serve — we will reach out directly to confirmed applicants
Date: Tentatively Friday (final confirmation pending)

** SESSION OPTIONS**

** $50 — Quick Refresh**
• 15 minutes
• 1 look
• 1–2 edited images
•* 2 slots available *

**$100 — Standard Headshot (Most Recommended)**
• 30 minutes
• 1 look
• 2–4 edited images

*4 slots available *

 **$200 — Professional Session**
• 60 minutes
• 1 look
• 5–7 edited images

*3 slots available *

 **$300 — Premium Session**
• 60 minutes
• 2 looks
• Full guided shoot experience
• 6–10 edited images

*1 slots available *

**Only 10 slots available this round!**

**HOW TO BOOK**

**Comment below with:**
1. **Your name**
2. **The tier you’re interested in ($50 / $100 / $200 / $300)**
3. **Your availability for Friday**

**We will review responses and reach out directly to confirm time slots.**

The Vision: My expertise lies in expressive portraiture and artistic nude photography, often blending the human figure with natural scenery.
While my portfolio features bold artistic nude work, I am equally open to shooting high-end portraits, fashion, or lifestyle with models who bring strong expression and creativity to the table. It’s all about the mood and the art!

Message me directly with your portfolio/IG.

IG: @hughleo1994

items.text:
CASTING CALL – VIDEO / FASHION COLLABORATION – BERLIN
Hi! My name is Hanna and I’m a producer based in Berlin, currently working on a fashion video editorial in collaboration with Naomi Tarazi. 

We are shooting with a professional production team in a Berlin hotel location.

Looking for:
– Female model
– East / Southeast Asian appearance
– Slim build, strong natural presence
– Comfortable in front of camera (video & stills)

Concept:
A clean, intimate hotel setting with a slightly awkward, off-balance mood. Focus on body lines, movement, and subtle, unconventional posing.

Mood:
– minimal
– quiet
– slightly strange / cinematic
– feminine but not overly polished

Styling:
Naomi Tarazi garments (sculptural silhouettes, tights, textures) + mix of minimalistic clothes and designer pieces 

HMU:
Natural skin, simple hair (straight / tied)

Shooting:
– within the next month
– Berlin (hotel location)
– professional crew on set (production studio)

You will receive:
THIS IS AN UNPAID POSITION
– professional video material + edited images for your portfolio

Moodboard attached

If you feel aligned with this aesthetic, please DM me or comment with your portfolio / Instagram and I’ll end you more details✨

Or reach me by this Email Address: hanna@nusual.studio
Selected models may be considered for future collaborations

items.text:
**CASTING CALL – SHORT FILM **

**ROLE: BOB**
Male, White, Late 50s–early 60s

Bob is a traditional, working-class American husband. He’s emotionally detached, habit-driven, and comfortably unaware of his wife’s inner life. 

He is not overtly cruel—his neglect is casual, ingrained, and almost invisible. His humor is dry, dismissive, and occasionally biting without realizing the impact. There’s a subtle humanity underneath, but it rarely surfaces.

**Tone/Performance Notes:**
* Naturalistic, grounded performance (not caricature)
* Strong sense of timing for dark comedy
* Ability to play obliviousness with authenticity
* Minimal physicality; performance is largely internal and reactive

**Project Details:**
* Short film (dark comedy / psychological drama)
* Non-union / micro-budget (include rate if applicable)
* Filming in Los Angeles 
* Dates:TBD  late summer/ early fall

**To Submit:**
Please send headshot, resume, and reel (if available) to: Allamericandinner@gmail.com
Subject line: “BOB Submission – All American Dinner”

topComments.text: Hello.  Will you be casting for any other roles?

items.text:
Due to unforseen circumstances we are recasting for our tour of the children’s theatre show, “Tom Gates Live”, based on the popular book series by Liz Pichon.

The show is written and directed by Miranda Larson with songs and music by Barrie Bignold and is produced by Mark Thompson at MT Productions.

Production dates:

Tour dates June – Oct 2026. We are currently have 35 dates over this period. 

This production will be based around London so the successful candidate will need a base in London or the surrounding area. 

**Tom Gates (Male, 16 years - 23 years)**

Tom Gates is an easily distracted and creative 10-year-old boy who loves doodling, listening to music, and annoying his older sister, Delia.

We are looking for a musical theatre performer that can sing, perform slapstick and comedy, and can perform the role of a young boy. He needs to be strictly 5'10" tall or smaller. 

Within the show, there is basic singing, dancing and movement but nothing too technical.

 

The successful applicant will need to be comfortable assisting with the load ins/ outs and have a full UK drivers licence as they will be asked to assist driving the touring cast car.

Playing age:

16 years - 23 years

Height:

147 — 178 cm

Gender:

Male

Contract info:

Show day fee: £150

Travel day fee: £50

Subsistence: £20

Please send CV's & headshots to 

casting.mtproductions@gmail.com

items.text:
# ***Chasing Shadows*** casting call!

Chasing Shadows is a crime/thriller/romance centred around Astrid Clarke, an English FBI agent, who is put on a case surrounding a gang who have the FBI chasing their tails. She is forced to choose where her loyalties lie when her brother is revealed to be in the gang, too.

---

UNPAID - Do not apply if you live outside of Cambridgeshire, as production can’t guarantee travel will be covered at this time. HOWEVER, if you wish to apply from outside the area, you will have to pay to get to Cambridgeshire, at which point, production would cover the remainder of your journey.

---

Hoping to shoot for a maximum of 7 days between June 29th and July 14th.

---

Please DM me for more info or email me at: hannahlwalker02@hotmail.com

items.text:
🎭 Singers/Actors wanted – New Musical (Demo Recording)

I’m a composer based in Gloucestershire, currently developing a new original musical, and I’m looking for a small group of singers/actors to help record a demo of a few songs.

The project: New musical (early development stage)

Piano-led score (recorded in Logic Pro)

Emotionally driven, character-focused songs.

What I’m looking for:3–5 singers / actors 

Comfortable singing solo or in small ensembles.

Musical theatre experience helpful but not essential.

Commitment: Very low pressure – a few relaxed sessions to record demo tracks.
Based around Gloucester / Hereford (flexible)

This is an unpaid, creative collaboration (for now)

Goal: To create a short demo (2–3 songs) to support development and potential showcase opportunities. 

If you’re interested (or just curious), drop me a message and I can send through a demo track and more info.

sharedPost.text:
SCHOS – My little Lake

Ein kleiner See, viel Licht, stille Wege am Ufer: My little Lake ist unser neuer Song mit englischen Lyrics – über einen Ort, an dem Fantasie und Himmel im Wasser spiegeln und der Kopf endlich ruhig wird.

Die Musik kommt aus Simbach am Inn, die Band aus mehreren Ländern – Rock mit klaren Melodien, englischem Text und viel Raum zum Eintauchen.

🎧 My little Lake ist bei allen gut sortierten Anbietern als Download und Stream verfügbar – z.B. Apple Music, Amazon Music und vielen weiteren Stores.

Musiker (Auszug)
Schos Riedl – keys, songwriting, production (Simbach am Inn, Bayern)
Racquel Roberts, voc (USA)
Mark Corradetti – bass (USA)
Paul Simmons – drums (USA)
Clint Wells – guitars (USA)

Mehr über SCHOS & alle Musiker:
🌐 Band: https://bandschos.com
🎼 Musiker & Credits: https://bandschos.com/musiker

© SCHOS – Schos Riedl. All rights reserved.

Hashtags (unter den Post setzen):

#SCHOS #MylittleLake #Rockmusic #EnglishLyrics #IndieRock #Simbach #AppleMusic #AmazonMusic #TimelessMusic

items.text:
Hello! 😃 Are your headshots over two years old? Would you prefer Spotlight-quality headshots in the convenience of your garden? Anywhere in England and Wales? Yes, literally anywhere 😳

A shoot in the convenience of your home is so much more relaxed - and what's more, you don't have to decide which tops are going to get creased in your suitcase!

In these times of expensive travel, save yourself a trip to London. I've photographed over 2,800 actors and cover every town, village and hamlet! Message me for route details and times 🤩📸

items.text: Hi All, my daughter has decided she needs to change her work experience placement. It was originally with a drama group but a lot has changed since she put her request forward. She would love to work background in TV or film. Anybody know who we could contact to see if there are placements? It’d be 6-10th July. Thanks for any help you can give me.

topComments.text: Try Lime pictures the makers of Hollyoaks
ITV are supposed to be really good with work experience. Or sign her up with a background artist agency like mint x

items.text:
I posted a few months back looking for advice moving forward with my son who is neurodivergent. Thanks to everyone’s advice we are now in acting classes, also my son in a specialised acting school. He’s doing theatre.  Both done short films (he got lead role) and played as featured extras in 2 credited movies for cinema release this year, also some promo work . 
Loving what we are doing and how things are going right now . So firstly wanted to see what people thought our acting age range would be. I’m 47 Dylan is 26 now. So I know what to apply for . Also  if there was any credited roles coming up I’m ready to try step into small roles but happy to do featured extra at minute if it is credited . And any more advice at this stage is welcomed, as I’m new just starting out 
Thank you

sharedPost.text:
🎬 OGŁOSZENIE – STATYŚCI DO NOWEGO SERIALU 🎬

Do nowego współczesnego serialu poszukujemy statystów do sceny rozgrywanej w pubie.

📅 Terminy zdjęć: 5 i 6 maja  
🕐 Zbiórki: około godziny 13:00  
🌗 Zdjęcia: dzienno-nocne  
📍 Lokalizacja: okolice Puszczy Kampinoskiej  

💰 Stawka:  
– 340 zł za dwa dni zdjęciowe (płatne drugiego dnia)  
– 400 zł łącznie dla osób, które przyjadą samochodem i zabiorą minimum 3 osoby (płatne drugiego dnia)

🚗 Mile widziane osoby zmotoryzowane

📩 Zgłoszenia prosimy wysyłać na maila:  
dorota.kamedstudio@gmail.com  
Temat wiadomości: „5-6 maja”

Jeśli możesz być dostępny/a tylko jednego dnia, koniecznie zaznacz to w zgłoszeniu.  
(Pierwszeństwo mają osoby dyspozycyjne przez oba dni.)

📝 W zgłoszeniu prosimy zawrzeć:
– imię i nazwisko  
– numer telefonu  
– miejsce zamieszkania  
– wiek  
– wzrost  
– rozmiar ubrania  
– 2 aktualne zdjęcia (twarz + sylwetka)

Zapraszamy do współpracy! 🎥

items.text:
**WARSZAWA**

**30 kwietnia (czwartek)**

** **

*Proszę o nie zgłaszanie się panów, którzy już wysłali zgłoszenie*.

** **

Doszukujemy jeszcze panów na plan filmu "Kosmonauta" na 30.04. Wiek od 18 lat w górę bez ograniczeń.

 

**Stawka 200 zł gotówką po planie (dzień zdjęciowy 130 zł + charakteryzacja 70 zł)**

** **

Charakteryzacja dzisiaj 27.04 i jutro 28.04. Na strzyżenie są zapraszane tylko wybrane osoby.

Zgłoszenia poproszę na adres: **ewelina.wika@podtytulem.pl**

W tytule: **KS 30**

W treści: imię i nazwisko, wiek, nr telefonu, miejscowość

W załączniku: **zdjęcie twarzy (selfie) i sylwetki: TYLKO Z DNIA ZGŁOSZENIA + zdjęcie z profilu**

** **

**ZDJĘCIE TWARZY** - portretowe selfie w dziennym świetle, na wprost, patrząc w obiektyw. Bez żadnych filtrów. Bez okularów. Bez nakrycia głowy. Kolorowe.

**ZDJĘCIE SYLWETKI** – aktualne, cała sylwetka

@wszyscy

items.text:
🎭 Question for actors ready to build a working career (not just train)?
Hi everyone, my name is Freya Tingley. I’m an actress who has worked on international film and television projects, including two Netflix series. I starred in Jersey Boys (directed by Clint Eastwood) and played Wendy Darling on Once Upon a Time.

I’ve been so grateful for the wave of interest and messages recently. It’s been amazing connecting with so many of you.

I’m now offering something I wish existed when I was starting out:

A 2-hour, 1:1 career mentorship session over Zoom.

One of the biggest frustrations I hear is this:
Actors are told “get an agent” but then once they have one, nothing happens.
And for many actors, the challenge is figuring out how to get an agent in the first place.

This session is designed for both.

We sit down and go through:
• What actually makes an actor book work (beyond just talent)
• How to position yourself to attract the right representation
• What to focus on if you don’t yet have an agent
• The materials you really need and what most actors get wrong
• How to approach auditions and self-tapes strategically
• Building a career that moves forward, not just sideways

You’ll leave with a clear, actionable plan so you’re not stuck wondering when the next audition is coming or why you’re not booking. You’ll know exactly what steps to take to create the career you want. 

If you’ve been feeling stuck or unsure, feel free to message me for details or to book.

items.text:
**🎬 CASTING CALL — OneTigris Brand Video Production**

We're shooting a 2-day commercial video campaign for **OneTigris** (onetigris.com), a leading tactical outdoor gear brand, and we're looking for talented on-camera performers in the **Los Angeles area**!

📅 **Shoot Days: May 2 & May 3** — you must be available for BOTH days to apply.

**🟠 ROLE 1 — MAIN TALENT (Male)** 📋 1 spot | Mid-20s to mid-30s | Paid
* Primary on-camera presence across all brand videos
* Must be comfortable and confident on camera
* Capable of handling tactical/outdoor gear scenes
* Athletic, active look that fits an outdoor lifestyle brand
* Commercial or brand experience a plus

⏱ **May 2:** Full day (~10 hrs) | **May 3:** Partial day (~6 hrs) 💰 **Rate: $300 per half-day**

**🟠 ROLE 2 — SUPPORTING TALENT (Female)** 📋 1 spot | Mid-20s to mid-30s | Paid
* Background and supporting roles (gym, security, lifestyle scenes)
* Split-screen and contrast shots with main talent
* Hand model shots featuring gear and accessories
* Pickup and coverage footage
* Easygoing, versatile, collaborative on set

⏱ **May 2:** Partial day (~6–8 hrs) | **May 3:** Partial day (~3–4 hrs) 💰 **Rate: $200 per half-day**

**🟠 Background Performers** 1–2 additional background performers may be needed. 💰 **Rate: $200 per half-day**

⚠️ **Please only apply if you are available for BOTH May 2 and May 3.** We are unable to accommodate partial availability for these roles.

**📩 TO APPLY, email casting@rarefloweragency.com:** 

✔ Your name & contact info 

✔ 2–3 recent photos (including one full-body) 

✔ Brief bio or any on-camera/commercial experience 

✔ Confirmation that you're available May 2 & 3

NOW CASTING 

Looking for an elderly 70-80 year old man to play the role of Grandpa Nick. He should have a look similar to of Robert De Niro- good physic, olive skin, a Mediterranean / Greek look. Very ethnic look. This role does not have any dialogue and would be to shoot one short scene.

scene. 

Also looking to cast a couple female actresses in the 30-40 age range to be background actors in one short scene. 

Synopsis:

Unforgettable is a story of a woman’s desperate attempt to get pregnant and on her journey, gets an unexpected message from her beloved Grandfather from the afterlife.

And how the signs along the way of her journey, whispered to her, what gifts would be put in her path. A true story of one woman’s synchronicity and love. 

PLEASE NOTE: this is a student film, it is no pay but all actors will receive IMDb credits. 

FILMING IN THE LOS ANGELES AREA.

ʙʀɪᴇꜰ #094 — ʟᴀʀɢᴇ ꜱᴄᴀʟᴇ ᴄᴀꜱᴛɪɴɢ ᴄᴀʟʟ 

ᴡᴇ ᴀʀᴇ ᴄᴜʀʀᴇɴᴛʟʏ ᴄᴀꜱᴛɪɴɢ ꜰᴏʀ ᴛʜᴇ ʀᴏᴏᴛᴇᴅ ʟᴏᴏᴋʙᴏᴏᴋ — ᴀ ᴍᴜʟᴛɪ-ꜱᴄᴇɴᴇ ᴘʀᴏᴅᴜᴄᴛɪᴏɴ ʀᴇQᴜɪʀɪɴɢ 40+ ɪɴᴅɪᴠɪᴅᴜᴀʟꜱ ᴀᴄʀᴏꜱꜱ ᴠᴀʀɪᴏᴜꜱ ʀᴏʟᴇꜱ.

ᴛʜᴇ ᴄʟɪᴇɴᴛ ɪꜱ ꜱᴇᴇᴋɪɴɢ ᴀ ᴅɪᴠᴇʀꜱᴇ ᴄᴀꜱᴛ ᴀᴄʀᴏꜱꜱ ᴀɢᴇꜱ, ᴄᴏᴍᴘʟᴇxɪᴏɴꜱ, ᴀɴᴅ ʙᴀᴄᴋɢʀᴏᴜɴᴅꜱ, ᴡɪᴛʜ ᴀ ꜱᴛʀᴏɴɢ ᴇᴍᴘʜᴀꜱɪꜱ ᴏɴ ᴄᴜʟᴛᴜʀᴀʟ ᴀᴜᴛʜᴇɴᴛɪᴄɪᴛʏ, ᴘʀᴇꜱᴇɴᴄᴇ, ᴀɴᴅ ɴᴀᴛᴜʀᴀʟ ᴏɴ-ꜱᴇᴛ ᴘᴇʀꜰᴏʀᴍᴀɴᴄᴇ.

ᴀᴛᴛᴀᴄʜᴇᴅ ɪꜱ ᴀ ꜰᴜʟʟ ᴏᴠᴇʀᴠɪᴇᴡ ᴏꜰ ᴀʟʟ ʀᴇQᴜɪʀᴇᴅ ʀᴏʟᴇꜱ.

ᴅᴇᴛᴀɪʟᴇᴅ ʙʀᴇᴀᴋᴅᴏᴡɴꜱ ʜᴀᴠᴇ ʙᴇᴇɴ ꜱᴛʀᴜᴄᴛᴜʀᴇᴅ ɪɴᴛᴏ 5 ꜱᴇᴘᴀʀᴀᴛᴇ ʙʀɪᴇꜰꜱ, ᴇᴀᴄʜ ᴏᴜᴛʟɪɴɪɴɢ ꜱᴘᴇᴄɪꜰɪᴄ ʀᴇQᴜɪʀᴇᴍᴇɴᴛꜱ ᴘᴇʀ ʀᴏʟᴇ. ᴛʜᴇꜱᴇ ᴀʀᴇ ᴀᴠᴀɪʟᴀʙʟᴇ ᴏɴ ᴛʜᴇ ᴡʜᴀᴛꜱᴀᴘᴘ ᴄʜᴀɴɴᴇʟ.

ᴛᴏ ʙᴇ ᴄᴏɴꜱɪᴅᴇʀᴇᴅ, ᴘʟᴇᴀꜱᴇ:
• ꜰᴏʟʟᴏᴡ ᴛʜᴇ ᴄʜᴀɴɴᴇʟ  
• ʀᴇᴠɪᴇᴡ ᴛʜᴇ ʀᴇʟᴇᴠᴀɴᴛ ʙʀɪᴇꜰ ᴄᴀʀᴇꜰᴜʟʟʏ  
• ꜱᴜʙᴍɪᴛ ᴏɴʟʏ ꜰᴏʀ ʀᴏʟᴇꜱ ʏᴏᴜ ᴀᴄᴄᴜʀᴀᴛᴇʟʏ ꜰɪᴛ  

📲 ꜰᴏʀ ᴀʟʟ ʙʀɪᴇꜰ ᴅᴇᴛᴀɪʟꜱ:  
https://whatsapp.com/channel/0029Vb36BNyJ93wXH19fMW2U

items.text:
Producer: Casting Call – Lead Male Role for Indie Feature (June Shoot)

We are currently casting for an independent feature film shooting this June and are seeking a talented actor for a key role.
Role: Male Lead
Age Range: 30–40
Ethnicity/Look: Middle Eastern or similar appearance
Project Details:
This is an indie feature film with a character-driven story and strong dramatic elements. Filming is scheduled for June, with rehearsals beginning within the next few days.
Requirements:
• Strong acting experience (film or theatre)
• Availability for rehearsals on short notice
• Full availability during the June shooting schedule
• Ability to collaborate closely with director and cast
Location: london
To Apply:
Please submit your headshot, resume, and a show reel (if available) to au.filmstudios@gmail.com. Include “Female Lead Casting – Indie Feature” in the subject line.
We are looking for someone committed, versatile, and ready to bring depth to a compelling role. We look forward to seeing your submissions.
Best regards,
Edilberto Restino [Zero 1 Films & AU Films Production]
[au.filmstudios@gmail.com]

items.text:
🎭 Question for parents of creative kids!
Hi everyone, my name is Freya Tingley. I’m an actress who has worked across international film and television, including two Netflix series. I starred in Jersey Boys directed by Clint Eastwood and played Wendy Darling on the ABC hit series Once Upon a Time.

I’ve been really grateful for the amount of interest and lovely messages I’ve received since opening up 1:1 acting classes and accent coaching.

Classes are 1 hour, once a week on Zoom, and include:

• Character development  

• Monologues  

• Scene work  

• Audition technique  

• Building confidence on camera  

• Line memorisation  

• Improvisation  

Accent coaching includes Standard American and English accents, and I also offer support with individual auditions.

If you have a child who loves acting, storytelling, or simply wants to build confidence, I would really love to hear from you.

Feel free to send me a message if you would like more details or to chat.

items.text:
Can you play a woman who swallowed a lifetime of fury — and finally, deliberately, chose where to aim it?

https://tinyurl.com/DraculaAudition
Audition registration is open until 17 May
Auditions 30/31 May by appointment.

The UK Amateur Premiere of Kate Hamill's Dracula, Halloween 2026

All crew/cast are unpaid roles
Rehearsals in Rochdale, Littleborough from August

sharedPost.text:
Mina

She is the most competent person in every room she enters.
The men don't notice.
She makes sure of it.

Intelligent. Loyal. Practical.
Brave in a way nobody has ever been asked to see.
Pregnant — and that is not a limitation.
It never was.

She knows every rule.
She follows every one.
Not because she has to.
Because she is waiting.
She wants to run wild.
She wants to fight.
She wants to be more than they will ever let her be.

She will be.

She was raised to be a Lady.
She is also the one who ends it.

This role is the spine of the production.
It demands emotional range, physical stamina, stage combat, and sincerity that never breaks.

Can you play a woman who swallowed a lifetime of fury — and finally, deliberately, chose where to aim it?"

Auditions 30/31 May

Register now.
🔗 https://tinyurl.com/DraculaAudition

#DarkTheatreRochdale #Dracula2026 #FeministTheatre #Mina #CharacterBreakdown

items.text:
Dark Theatre Rochdale ·  St Aidan's Church Hall ·  29–31 October 2026 

Dracula: A Feminist Revenge Fantasy, Really takes Kate Hamill's incendiary new play and puts it in the hands of Dark Theatre Rochdale for the UK Amateur Premiere. This is Dracula as a satirical dissection — the monster is not the fangs. 
The monster is entitlement, grooming, and the casual exercise of power over other people. 
He is charming. You would like him. That is the point.
The women of this story were always the most intelligent people in the room. 
This time, they get the ending they earned.

🎭 Auditions on 30/31 May by appointment 
Register now, for a guaranteed slot!!
 https://tinyurl.com/DraculaAudition

“DRACULA” is presented through special arrangement with and all authorised performance materials are supplied by TRW PLAYS www.trwplays.co.uk

#DarkTheatreRochdale #Dracula2026 #FeministTheatre #UKAmateurPremiere #Auditions

sharedPost.text:
Dark Theatre Rochdale ·  St Aidan's Church Hall ·  29–31 October 2026 

📖 You know the story. 
A vampire arrives in England. 
Women start acting strangely. 
Men scramble to save them.

You think you know how it ends, but you've been reading the wrong version.

Dracula: A Feminist Revenge Fantasy, Really takes Kate Hamill's incendiary new play and puts it in the hands of Dark Theatre Rochdale for the UK Amateur Premiere. This is Dracula as a satirical dissection — the monster is not the fangs. 
The monster is entitlement, grooming, and the casual exercise of power over other people. 
He is charming. You would like him. That is the point.
The women of this story were always the most intelligent people in the room. 
This time, they get the ending they earned.

Dark Theatre Rochdale is the first amateur company in the United Kingdom to perform Kate Hamill's Dracula: A Feminist Revenge Fantasy, Really. 
Kate Hamill is one of America's most celebrated theatre writers — her feminist adaptations of classic texts have been performed at major venues across the US and UK. 

This is the UK amateur premiere.

🎭 Auditions on 30/31 May by appointment 
Register now, for a guaranteed slot!!

🔗 LINK IN BIO

CONTENT WARNING
Dracula: A Feminist Revenge Fantasy, Really contains: stage combat and stage blood, simulated physical violence, themes of coercive control and sexual predation, themes of self-harm, adult language, fog effects, and sudden loud sounds.
All intimacy and combat is professionally choreographed. 
A Wellbeing and Intimacy Associate is present at all performances.
Suitable for ages 14+. 
Under 16s should be accompanied by an adult

“DRACULA” is presented through special arrangement with and all authorised performance materials are supplied by TRW PLAYS www.trwplays.co.uk

#DarkTheatreRochdale #Dracula2026 #FeministTheatre #UKAmateurPremiere #Auditions

items.summary:
Dark Theatre Rochdale ·  St Aidan's Church Hall ·  29–31 October 2026 

Dracula: A Feminist Revenge Fantasy, Really takes Kate Hamill's incendiary new play and puts it in the hands of Dark Theatre Rochdale for the UK Amateur Premiere. This is Dracula as a satirical dissection — the monster is not the fangs. 
The monster is entitlement, grooming, and the casual exercise of power over other people. 
He is charming. You would like him. That is the point.
The women of this story were always the most intelligent people in the room. 
This time, they get the ending they earned.

🎭 Auditions on 30/31 May by appointment 
Register now, for a guaranteed slot!!
 https://tinyurl.com/DraculaAudition

“DRACULA” is presented through special arrangement with and all authorised performance materials are supplied by TRW PLAYS www.trwplays.co.uk

#DarkTheatreRochdale #Dracula2026 #FeministTheatre #UKAmateurPremiere #Auditions

SOS! Min 7-årige søn blev bidt af dette. Det ser uhyggeligt ud. Jeg viste billedet til min svigerinde, der bor i nærheden, og hun sagde, at hun havde fundet lignende insekter i sit hus. Har du nogen idé om, hvad det kunne være?
Opskriften er i kommentarerne . 
Jeg sendte den til dem, der takkede mig.

items.text:
**Mini serial  1940 – ‘’ 2 podoficer Waffen SS  -  mężczyzna  (casting on-line )**

 

Nasza Gliwicka Grupa Pasjonatów **‘’Grupa1940’’** poszukuje  mężczyzny w wieku 30 – 40 do roli podoficera Waffen SS . Szukamy osoby bez zarostu oraz tatuaży na twarzy. Postać będzie mieć kwestie po niemiecku. Mile widziana osoba z Gliwic lub okolic: Zabrza czy Katowic. Wystąpi w kilku odcinkach. Zdjęcia próbne realizujemy  w Gliwicach. Spotykamy się w wybrane niedziele z wyprzedzeniem 1 2 tygodniowym.  

 

**Od kwietnia 2026 zaczęliśmy realizacje zdjęć do tego **projektu. Mini serial jest oparty o wątki grupy okultystycznej ’’**Ahnenerbe’**’ która chce zdobyć słynne artefakty ale w tym ktoś im chce przeszkadzać. Projekt będzie  się składać z 6 odcinków po 10/12 minut każdy. Będziemy też sukcesywnie dodawać inne ogłoszenia związane z tym projektem. Mile widziane zdjęcia aktualne. Na zdjęciu powyżej osoba będzie mieć podobny kostium.** **Umieszczone materiały są z naszej sesji.** Nie będzie to zlecenie płatne.**

 

Od 01.04.25 założyliśmy swój kanał na portalu youtube z filmami z naszych planów żeby można było zobaczyć jak to u nas wygląda od kuchni. 

 

[https://www.youtube.com/channel/UCE8KyfwpyFGzzwUDqdwy74g](https://www.youtube.com/channel/UCE8KyfwpyFGzzwUDqdwy74g)

https://www.instagram.com/lukasz.magiera.official

** **

**Nie będzie to zlecenie płatne.**

 

Więcej informacji na Priv

**Serial nie jest stworzony z sympatii do tej nazistowskiej organizacji lecz wynika to z samego scenariusza aby ukazał zbrodnie i sam fakt iż była w pełni zła. W produkcji znajdą się osoby, które będą chcieć walczyć i potępiać te wielkie zło jakim był nazizm. W oparciu o Dz.U.2017.0.2204 t.j. - Ustawa z dnia 6 czerwca 1997 r. - Kodeks karny,Art. 256 "Propagowanie faszyzmu lub innego ustroju totalitarnego lub nawoływanie domnienawiści", §3 - nie narusza prawa proponując przedmiot do celów historycznych lub kolekcjonerskich.**

items.text:
Hej

Do reklamy piwa poszukujemy obsady. 

**SZUKAMY:**

**Mężczyzna: **

• mężczyzna ok 30-40, „męski”,  lekki zarost/ wąsy mile widziane 

• budowa ciała lekko umięśniony nie chudy i nie bardzo napakowany 

• ładne dłonie i ręce 

• duża świadomośc własnego ciała, zgrabne ruchy 

**Kobieta: **

• kobieta w przedziale wiekowym ok 30-37lat, mile widziana wyjątkowa uroda np.: piegi, naturalne kręcone włosy, secesyjna uroda, może być trochę nietypowa, naturalna

• jesteśmy otwarci na różne kolory włosów 

• Brak tatuażu i piercingu na powierzchni twarzy 

• duża świadomośc własnego ciała, zgrabne ruchy 

**PRAWA:**

Wyślę wybranym osobom 

**STAWKI:**

Dzień zdjęciowy: 1 800 PLN zł netto 

**Prawa na 6 mcy: 7**000 zł netto 

**Prawa na 12 mcy: 10**000 zł netto 

**STAWKI ZAWIERAJĄ JUŻ PROWIZJĘ AGENCJI**

**TERMINY:**

Termin nadsyłania zgłoszeń : 03.05 do godziny 14:00

Zdjęcia: 18-19.05.2026 - do potwierdzenia czy każdy aktor ma dwa dni

UWAGA ROLA MĘSKA MÓWIONA 

Zgłoszenia proszę wysyłać na adres [slavic.squad.cast@gmail.com](mailto:slavic.squad.cast@gmail.com) 

W tytule proszę wpisać IMIĘ I NAZWISKO + PIWO 

W treści 
1. Imię i nazwisko 
2. Wiek 
3. Numer telefonu 

 • 4. 2-3 aktualne zdjecia

items.text:
Pilnie potrzebuje kobiety wyglądającej na ok. 35-40 lat do roli matki głównej bohaterki w moim krótkometrażowym filmie non profit. Nagrywany on będzie w Warszawie, 30 i 31 maja tego roku, prosiłabym o dostępność w oba dni. Jest to jedna z ważniejszych ról, zawierająca dwie sceny wymagające pokazania emocji bohatera, dlatego świetnie jakby zgłosił się ktoś z jakimś doświadczeniem aktorskim, ale rozważę każde zgłoszenia, również ludzi który chcą zacząć budować swoje portfolio:). Film ma dotyczyć przewlekłego bólu wśród młodzieży, chce go zrealizować jako projekt zwracający uwagę na ten problem społeczny, chce go również wysłać na festiwale.
Bardzo proszę o przemyślane zgłoszenia z przemyśleniem dostępności 30 i 31 maja, ponieważ data jest już zaklepana i bardzo zależy mi by nikt się już nie wycofał.
Bardzo proszę o kontakt w komentarzach lub w wiadomości prywatnej!

topComments.text: Hej, rozumiem temat, wiem o czym to jest , zapraszam Cię do kontaktu, jeśli jesteś zainteresowana to pisze z mojego profilu :)

Congratulations to #ICKIENEOARLO next projects. 
If we can follow the news shared by #VogueTaiwan there is much more  #greatentertainment expected in alliance with #HBO .
Sounds like fruitful next  10 years in the industry.

Next projects officially published by the Industry are 
#Primetime
#TheChaperons
#Howtosaveamarriage
#Possession

Perhaps you have seen #MagicFarm (2025) or #Rottinginthesun (2023)

#RobertPattinson is also mentioned as #executive #producer with his latest project   #DieMyLove directed by Lynne Ramsey (2025)
 So you please show #respect when you get the chance to meet him 
around the #CannesFilmFestival especially when it should be on May 13th. 
Thank you.

pageName.name: In the footsteps of Robert Pattinson

user.name: In the footsteps of Robert Pattinson

sharedPost.text:
VOGUE TAIWAN: In an era of booming social media, where YouTubers and internet celebrities are ubiquitous, the word "star" seems to have lost its meaning. ROBERT PATTINSON has taken a different path from his contemporaries—he doesn't cultivate a social media presence, has limited public appearances, maintains a distance from the media, and even deliberately obscures his own image in interviews. Despite this, he continues to maintain a certain level of market presence and creative flexibility, navigating between commercial and art films. Because of this, some foreign media outlets have discussed: "Is Robert Pattinson the last movie star of this generation?"

After TWILIGHT Robert Pattinson embarked on a decade-long transition, collaborating with distinctive art-house directors. From David Cronenberg's 2019 film COSMOPOLIS and the Safdie Brothers' GOOD TIME, to Robert Eggers' THE LIGHTHOUSE, his roles focused on characters with intense psychological states and unstable narrative structures, gradually shifting his acting away from traditional genres. The goal? To shed his established idol image and expand his range of roles. Subsequently, Robert Pattinson returned to big-budget commercial productions with his role in THE BATMAN.

Around 2022, Robert Pattinson and his former assistant, Brighton McCloskey, co-founded the production company Icki Eneo Arlo, shifting their focus behind the scenes. The decision to start a production company stemmed from his observation of the limitations of an actor's career. Through production, he was able to move from being simply chosen to being involved in the development of film projects, and gain a deeper understanding of his role as a performer. Currently, Icki Eneo Arlo has signed a production agreement with Warner Bros. and is working with HBO Max. It has about 20 film and television projects in development, covering documentaries and dramas.

Robert Pattinson maintains an uneasily clear-headed perspective amidst the changes in the film industry. For him, finding balance in instability is the norm in contemporary filmmaking.

Source https://www.vogue.com.tw/article/robert-pattinson-movie-star-actor?fbclid=IwY2xjawRhmLJleHRuA2FlbQIxMQBicmlkETFXbWhNMmdvbmdFMzl0ZDhQc3J0YwZhcHBfaWQQMjIyMDM5MTc4ODIwMDg5MgABHstvIszDEYys3K-GJVJH1MRKspFez3Ka2KP4s4Im8eqk_2uDWvo6Xf4bOw07_aem_nH8vVrufLZITekXEv55pww

**Mroczne sesje**

 

Poszukuje kobiet w **wieku od 18**, górna granica nie ma znaczenia. Wykonuje sesje w stylu mrocznym wykorzystując różne gadżety i kostiumy. Szukam kobiet ,które nie boją się własnego ciała. Doświadczenie nie jest tu ważne.

Osoba zainteresowana powinna najlepiej mieszkać **w Gliwicach** lub okolicach ( Zabrze, Katowice chyba, że ktoś jest bardzo zainteresowany i mieszka dalej to też ok. z tym,że nie zwracam za bilety.) tak aby dojazd był krótki dla niej. Sesje wykonuje tylko w Gliwicach. Po sesji i obrobieniu zdjęć, zostaną one wysłane modelce do jej wykorzystania. **Nie będzie to zlecenie płatne**, umowa na zasadzie **TFP**

** **

**Zapraszam na stronę Facebook Łukasz Magiera – Fotografia i maxmodel lukus_wielki2**

 

Więcej informacji na Priv

Dzięki niemu „Lilka" przestała być tylko nazwiskiem na liście odznaczonych Krzyżem Walecznych, a stała się postacią bliską, z krwi i kości. Dzięki niemu „Lilka" przestała być tylko nazwiskiem na liście odznaczonych Krzyżem Walecznych, a stała się postacią bliską, z krwi i kości. May be an image of text that says 'Symbolika Opatowca: Historia "Lilki" jest nierozerwalnie związana z historią regionu świętokrzyskiego i tamtejszych oddziałów partyzanckich, które w 1944 roku stawiały zacięty opór okupantowi. Działania jej bratanka pokazują, jak wielką siłę ma pamięć rodzinna przekuta w inicjatywę kulturalną, pozwalającą zachować tożsamość narodową dla przyszłych pokoleń.'

items.text:
💥TERAZ CENA PORADNIKA - 19 ZŁ!🚀

🚀TYLKO DLA DZIESIĘCIU OSÓB*💥

* OFERTA LIMITOWANA (10 PORADNIKÓW W CENIE 19 ZŁ, PO ZAKUPIE DZIESIĘCIU SZTUK PRZEZ KLIENTÓW, AUTOMATYCZNIE WRACA CENA PODSTAWOWA 59 ZŁ)

SZKORZYSTAJ Z OKAZJI! ⏳️

🎬 OD ZERA DO PLANU FILMOWEGO
Praktyczny przewodnik epizodysty

Chcesz spróbować swoich sił na planie filmowym, ale nie wiesz od czego zacząć?
A może byłeś już na planie i czujesz, że działasz trochę po omacku?

👉 Ten poradnik powstał, żebyś nie musiał uczyć się wszystkiego metodą prób i błędów.

💡 To wiedza od praktyka – nie teoria
Nazywam się Bartłomiej Skowron.

Zaczynałem od zera – bez znajomości, bez szkoły aktorskiej.

Wcześniej przez lata byłem w wojsku.
Dopiero później podjąłem decyzję, żeby zmienić życie i spróbować swoich sił na planie filmowym.

Dziś mam na koncie:
✔ ponad 100 projektów
✔ epizody w serialach i filmach (w tym produkcje Netflix)
✔ współpracę z rozpoznawalnymi aktorami
✔ doświadczenie, które zebrałem „od środka”

👉Sprawdź moje doświadczenie:

https://filmpolski.pl/fp/index.php?osoba=11200011

https://www.filmweb.pl/person/Bart%C5%82omiej+Skowron-2973719

https://www.imdb.com/name/nm13121784/?ref_=fn_t_1

Mój profil aktorski na Instagramie:
https://www.instagram.com/barlomiej_skowron_official

👉 Ten poradnik to dokładnie to, czego sam potrzebowałem na starcie.

📘 Co znajdziesz w środku?
✔ Wstęp – jak wygląda prawdziwy początek
✔ Czym jest praca epizodysty w praktyce
✔ Moja historia – od wojska do planu
✔ Czy to jest dla Ciebie? (bez ściemy)
✔ Jak zacząć – pierwsze realne kroki
✔ Casting – jak to wygląda naprawdę
✔ Pierwszy dzień na planie – instrukcja przetrwania
✔ Zasady niepisane na planie
✔ Pieniądze, umowy i realia finansowe
✔ Co dalej – rozwój i możliwości
✔ Najczęstsze pytania i sytuacje kryzysowe

📖 Ponad 100 stron konkretnej wiedzy
Bez lania wody.
Bez motywacyjnych bajek.
Tylko realia tej branży.

🎥 Dlaczego warto?
✔ możesz zacząć nawet bez doświadczenia
✔ to realna opcja, żeby dorobić do budżetu
✔ poznasz ludzi z branży i znane twarze
✔ zbudujesz kontakty, które otwierają drzwi
✔ zobaczysz, jak naprawdę wygląda plan filmowy od środka

Dla jednych to przygoda.
Dla innych dodatkowy zarobek.
Dla niektórych – początek nowej drogi.

⚠️ To nie jest poradnik o „łatwej sławie”
To szczery przewodnik dla osób, które chcą wejść w ten świat świadomie i bez rozczarowań.

To najlepszy moment, żeby zacząć – taniej i z konkretną wiedzą w ręku.

🔥 Jeśli ja mogłem zacząć od zera – Ty też możesz.

⬇️Link do bezpośredniego zakupu 📲
https://www.naffy.io/bartlomiej-skowron/od-zera-do-planu-filmowego-praktyczny-przewodnik-epizodysty-oE1

💥TERAZ CENA PORADNIKA - 19 ZŁ!🚀

🚀TYLKO DLA DZIESIĘCIU OSÓB*💥

* OFERTA LIMITOWANA (10 PORADNIKÓW W CENIE 19 ZŁ, PO ZAKUPIE DZIESIĘCIU SZTUK PRZEZ KLIENTÓW, AUTOMATYCZNIE WRACA CENA PODSTAWOWA 59 ZŁ)

SZKORZYSTAJ Z OKAZJI! ⏳️

🎬 OD ZERA DO PLANU FILMOWEGO
Praktyczny przewodnik epizodysty

Chcesz spróbować swoich sił na planie filmowym, ale nie wiesz od czego zacząć?
A może byłeś już na planie i czujesz, że działasz trochę po omacku?

👉 Ten poradnik powstał, żebyś nie musiał uczyć się wszystkiego metodą prób i błędów.

💡 To wiedza od praktyka – nie teoria
Nazywam się Bartłomiej Skowron.

Zaczynałem od zera – bez znajomości, bez szkoły aktorskiej.

Wcześniej przez lata byłem w wojsku.
Dopiero później podjąłem decyzję, żeby zmienić życie i spróbować swoich sił na planie filmowym.

Dziś mam na koncie:
✔ ponad 100 projektów
✔ epizody w serialach i filmach (w tym produkcje Netflix)
✔ współpracę z rozpoznawalnymi aktorami
✔ doświadczenie, które zebrałem „od środka”

👉Sprawdź moje doświadczenie:

https://filmpolski.pl/fp/index.php?osoba=11200011

https://www.filmweb.pl/person/Bart%C5%82omiej+Skowron-2973719

https://www.imdb.com/name/nm13121784/?ref_=fn_t_1

Mój profil aktorski na Instagramie:
https://www.instagram.com/barlomiej_skowron_official

👉 Ten poradnik to dokładnie to, czego sam potrzebowałem na starcie.

📘 Co znajdziesz w środku?
✔ Wstęp – jak wygląda prawdziwy początek
✔ Czym jest praca epizodysty w praktyce
✔ Moja historia – od wojska do planu
✔ Czy to jest dla Ciebie? (bez ściemy)
✔ Jak zacząć – pierwsze realne kroki
✔ Casting – jak to wygląda naprawdę
✔ Pierwszy dzień na planie – instrukcja przetrwania
✔ Zasady niepisane na planie
✔ Pieniądze, umowy i realia finansowe
✔ Co dalej – rozwój i możliwości
✔ Najczęstsze pytania i sytuacje kryzysowe

📖 Ponad 100 stron konkretnej wiedzy
Bez lania wody.
Bez motywacyjnych bajek.
Tylko realia tej branży.

🎥 Dlaczego warto?
✔ możesz zacząć nawet bez doświadczenia
✔ to realna opcja, żeby dorobić do budżetu
✔ poznasz ludzi z branży i znane twarze
✔ zbudujesz kontakty, które otwierają drzwi
✔ zobaczysz, jak naprawdę wygląda plan filmowy od środka

Dla jednych to przygoda.
Dla innych dodatkowy zarobek.
Dla niektórych – początek nowej drogi.

⚠️ To nie jest poradnik o „łatwej sławie”
To szczery przewodnik dla osób, które chcą wejść w ten świat świadomie i bez rozczarowań.

To najlepszy moment, żeby zacząć – taniej i z konkretną wiedzą w ręku.

🔥 Jeśli ja mogłem zacząć od zera – Ty też możesz.

⬇️Link do bezpośredniego zakupu 📲
https://www.naffy.io/bartlomiej-skowron/od-zera-do-planu-filmowego-praktyczny-przewodnik-epizodysty-oE1

items.text:
Rainhill Garrick Society are performing ‘Allo Allo’ in October 2026. 

Based on the hugely successful British television series that ran for seven seasons, this uproarious comedy relates the adventures of a hapless cafe owner, René, in occupied France. You can see all of your favourite TV characters in the flesh, including Rene's tone-deaf wife Edith, Major-General von Klinkerhoffen and the Gestapo officer Herr Flick!

He and his wife have stashed a priceless portrait stolen by the Nazis in a sausage in their cellar, where two British airmen are also hiding until the Resistance can repatriate them. Communications with London using the wireless that is disguised as a cockatoo add to the many embarrassments this intrepid proprietor endures in the company of his patrons. News that the Führer is scheduled to visit the town inspires tricksters disguised as Hitler to frequent the cafe. Meanwhile René summons all the wit he can muster to save his cafe and his life.

Audition Dates: Tuesday 26th May (play reading)  and Thursday 28th May (audition)

Rehearsal Schedule will be Tuesdays and Thursdays, with the 3 Sundays preceding the performance

Performance Dates: 15th - 17th October 2026

Characters and Descriptions:

(Character Descriptions include accent descriptions, which the director has mentioned she can/will help with - the humour in the play can come from the exaggerated accents) 

Yvette...French..attractive young waitress having an affair with Rene.

Mimi...also French..young and preferably small. She's also madly in love with Rene as she works as a waitress in his cafe.

((Both Mimi and Yvette also supplement their income with a bit of genteel prostitution in the upstairs of the cafe.))

Leclerc ...French...middle aged...part of the resistance message carrying group and always donning disguises that are easily seen through..but he thinks they're brilliant. Could be female or male. 

Michelle..French...young.ish!? Leader of the resistance..feisty and determined. 

Col Von Strohm..German...middle aged..pompous, deluded and enjoying a cushy posting in charge of the occupation of this French village, but also incompetent.

Capt Bertorelli..Italian..any age...thinks he's God's gift to women. Deluded.

Here Fick...German gestapo leader..fanatical, inflexible deadpan humour..any age.

Helga..young..ish..typical blond German vision of female beauty. Spies for the more reasonable German  leaders on Herr Flick schemes, but she is reasonable and likeable. 

Lieut. Gruber.. any age.. German..drives a "little tank" and fancies Rene. 

General Von Schmelling..middle aged German..humourless, overbearing and ruthless.

Crabtree..English spy who speaks very funny fractured French whilst dressed as a policeman.

1st and 2nd Airmen are small parts that speak impeccable "tally-ho" type English but not seen much as they're hiding in Rene's cellar.

For more information please contact: sophie.brogan14@gmail.com

items.text:
🎬 CASTING CALL – LIVERPOOL & NORTH WEST (UK)

Feature Film: One Man’s Land

📖 ABOUT THE FILM

One Man’s Land follows Harry, a disgraced war veteran returning home after serving time for war crimes committed during his final tour in Afghanistan.

He struggles to rebuild his life in a place that no longer feels familiar. His father is in prison, his mother has passed and his sister wants nothing to do with him. When he reconnects with an old comrade, Ken, he is drawn into a fringe far-right political movement that feeds his anger and disillusionment.

At the same time, Harry forms a fragile connection with Ruth, one of the few people who sees beyond his past.

Despite his best efforts to balance his personal feelings and his distorted views, Harry’s decisions lead him down a path of no return.

🎥 PROJECT DETAILS

• Feature film (low-budget, high-quality production)
• Flexible shoot schedule across multiple months
• Filming in Merseyside
• Non-union project
• Paid roles (flat fee, negotiated)
• Professional crew using industry-standard equipment

🎬 Auditions: May
📍 SAE Institute, Georgia House, Pall Mall, Liverpool L3 6AL
🚆 Nearest station: Moorfields

⚠️ Important
This film includes mature themes and strong language, including racist rhetoric reflective of certain characters.

🎭 ROLES

HARRY (Mid 30s – Early 40s)
North-West accent. Former Afghan veteran. Physically fit, rough around the edges. Quiet but volatile.
Lead role with strong emotional range.
⚠️ Includes two scenes involving kissing (a peck and a brief intimate moment). An intimacy coordinator will be present.

RUTH (Mid 30s – Early 40s)
North-West accent. Barmaid with a hidden past. Warm, likeable, emotionally guarded.
⚠️ Includes two scenes involving kissing (a peck and a brief intimate moment). An intimacy coordinator will be present.

LAURA (Late 20s – Early 30s)
North-West accent. Harry’s ex. Direct, hardened, not interested in reconnecting.

BARB (Mid – Late 50s)
North-West accent. Reclusive mother grieving her son. Approx. 1 shoot day.

PETE GOLD (Late 40s – Mid 50s)
British accent. Charismatic but manipulative far-right leader.
⚠️ Contains inflammatory dialogue reflective of the character.

ALICE (Early – Mid 20s)
North-West accent. Harry’s sister. Caring but distant. Has moved on.

DR AVERY (Mid 30s+)
Preferably female. Court-appointed therapist. Professional, empathetic.

📌 REQUIREMENTS
• Headshot
• Showreel

📩 Apply: onemanslandfilm@gmail.com

items.text:
Sharing a workshop for Theatre Makers - part of Practice Lab by PROJEKT EUROPA at Chisenhale Dance Space in London! Only a £5 contribution required! Bookings on the website: https://www.projekteuropa.org/lab

**13 May 2026 - 18:00-20:00**

**Who Am I When I’m Hacked? - A Creative Exploration of Social Media Identity led by Laura Mottola**

This creative workshop is a devising lab exploring the intersection of social media and identity. We will creatively explore a common and deeply personal experience: having your social media account hacked. The aim is to expose how intimately tied our digital presence is to our sense of self, and what happens when that identity is taken from us.

We will explore the emotional and psychological impact of losing control over our social media identity. Through guided discussion, improvisation, and collaborative devising, we’ll examine the blurred line between who we are and who we present ourselves to be online, and what’s at stake when that version is stolen. Being hacked is intimate. It's an invasion without fingerprints. It’s someone wearing your face and speaking in your voice. A contemporary tragedy with WiFi. We scroll. We curate. We perform. But who performs when we lose the account?

Join Laura to play at the edge of authorship and identity!

(Disclaimer**: **This workshop explores themes Laura is developing for a new performance work. The session is a research and devising lab, not a content extraction session. It is a collaborative exploration and any personal stories, text or movement generated remain the property of their creators).
