LOS ANGELES CASTING 🇳🇱

SKECHERS commercial for DUTCH TV featuring soccer legend Ruud Gullit.

Seeking fluent/native Dutch speakers in Los Angeles for one-line principal roles.

Must be LA local hire and able to self-report to set in Los Angeles.

Non-Union. FICORE welcome.
Rate: $1,500 + 20% AF
Shoot: May 11 in Los Angeles
Fitting: May 8 in Los Angeles
Callbacks: May 7 via Zoom
Self-tapes: April 30 – May 6

ROLES:
Athletic Gym-Goer — Woman, 18–30
Athletic Man — Man, 30–40
Car Valet — Man, 18–29
Soccer Fan — Man, 30–40
Restaurant Diner — Man, 40–50
Waiter — Woman, 18–30

All ethnic appearances welcome.

Must speak real fluent Dutch — not Duolingo Dutch.

Submit via Casting Networks:
https://app.castingnetworks.com/public-pages/open-call/skechers-slip-ins-dutch-tv/13ced886-4469-11f1-8db6-331d4b78bece

Please share with Dutch speakers, Dutch actors, Dutch expats, and Netherlands/Benelux community members in Los Angeles.

items.text:
NARROW PATH

Most portfolios look the same. That’s why most people don’t get picked.

If you’ve been holding back because everything feels expensive or out of reach or you’re tired of blending in this is where that changes.

I’ve spent 20 years behind the camera.
Now I’m building people who are ready to stand out.

Looking for:
Models / Actors / Musicians
• Headshots that actually get attention
• Showreels with purpose
• Real creative work. not filler

This isn’t for everyone.

Only reach out if you:
• Show up
• Take direction
• Want to improve
• Follow through

Casey Miners
Creative Director
Toowoomba
0432 282 150
IG: www.instagram.com/narrow_path_training_academy

​🎬 CASTING CALL! 🎬
Main apni aane wali do short films "THE SMOKE" aur "FILMI KIDA" ke liye fresh talent aur professional actors ki talash mein hoon. Ye films National aur International Film Festivals ke liye banayi ja rahi hain.

​Agar aap mein acting ka junoon hai aur aap ek professional setup mein kaam karna chahte hain, toh humein join karein!

​📍 Location: Mumbai

🎭 Requirement: Stage artists, Newcomers, aur Experienced actors.

​Apply Kaise Karein?

Apna Portfolio/Work Links niche diye gaye email ya WhatsApp par bhejein:

📧 Email: [sherazshaikh98@gmail.com]

📞 WhatsApp: [91727 03027/  88504 31917]

​Let's create cinema for the global stage! 🎥✨

​Hashtags for Reach:

​#CastingCall #ActingJobs #ShortFilm #IndependentCinema #MumbaiActors #Newcomers #StageArtists #TheatreActors #FilmFestival #TheSmoke #FilmiKida #CastingDirector #ActorsLife #AuditionNotice #FreshTalent #BollywoodCasting #IndieFilm #ArtistHiring #NationalFilmFestival #InternationalFilmFestival

• Acting / Commercial

Open to creative direction and confident across a range of styles, with strong on-camera presence and professionalism on set.

If you’re looking to create something unique, feel free to get in touch.

items.text:
PRZESMYK sezon 2 ostatni rozdział.                                                      

Od kilku miesięcy widzicie  FB Studio ABM relacje i ogłoszenia z realizacji tajemniczego serialu. Pewnie już wszyscy wiedzą , ale my dopiero dzisiaj możemy to ogłosić. Tak, to jest drugi sezon serialu PRZESMYK.  

W PIERWSZYM KOMENTARZU ZAMIESZCZAMY link do formularza zgłoszeniowego. 

Zapraszamy do wypełniania go mieszkańców WARSZAWY i najbliższych okolic.  

Poszukujemy: 
komandosów - osób dobrze zbudowanych, wysokich, kulturystów, bokserów, zapaśników, judoków, doświadczonych zawodników jak i emerytowanych sportowcó. Zapraszamy panó i panie  w wieku 30-50 lat i  epizodystów - również w wieku 30-50 

Wszystkie szczegóły i stawki w formularzu zgoszeniowym. Link do niego w PIERWSZYM KOMENTARZU.

TO JUŻ OSTATNIA SZANSA NA UDZIAŁ W DRUGIM SEZONIE  PRZESMYKU!!!

Studio ABM  najkrótsza droga na plan filmowy!

sharedPost.text:
🎬 CASTING – EPIZODYŚCI 🎬  zdjęcia w Warszawie (brak zwrotów za dojazd) 5 i 6 maja (do potwierdzenia data i informacja czy dana rola będzie miała 1 dzień czy 2 dni zdjęciowe - prosimy o zgłoszenia osoby w pełni dyspozycyjne  5 i 6 maja)

Do pilotażowego odcinka serialu fabularyzowanego (true crime / paradokument) poszukujemy epizodystów do poniższych ról:  

🔹 1. Podejrzany (epizod mówiony)  
Mężczyzna 29–35 lat, wschodni akcent/język (rosyjski/ukraiński mile widziany), dobrze zbudowany, „gangsterski” vibe.  
💰 700 zł brutto/dzień  

🔹 2. Kurier (epizod niemy)  
Mężczyzna 35–45 lat, zmęczony, niepewny, człowiek żyjący na marginesie 
💰 350 zł brutto/dzień  

🔹 3. Mechanik (epizod niemy)  
Mężczyzna 39–50 lat, zwyczajny, konkretny, mile widziana ciemniejsza karnacja lub opalenizna.  
💰 350 zł brutto/dzień  

🔹 4. Rekruter (epizod niemy)  
Mężczyzna 35–45 lat, sprytny, kontaktowy, typ sprzedawcy.  
💰 350 zł brutto/dzień  

🔹 5. Ekspert (epizod mówiony)  
Osoba 40–65 lat, spokojny, precyzyjny głos, możliwa gra bez pokazywania twarzy.  
💰 560 zł brutto/dzień  

🔹 6. Jarosław (epizod niemy)  
Mężczyzna 30–35 lat, z zarostem.  
💰 350 zł brutto/dzień  

🔹 7. Kobieta (epizod niemy)  
25–35 lat, ładna brunetka, naturalny wygląd.  
💰 350 zł brutto/dzień  

🔹 8. Dziewczynka (epizod niemy)  - tylko dzieci ze zgodą PIP w naszej agencji!
ok. 7 lat  
💰 350 zł brutto/dzień  

🔹 9. Mężczyzna (epizod mówiony)  
ok. 60 lat, wschodni wygląd/język  
💰 490 zł brutto/dzień  

🔹 10. Kobieta (epizod niemy)  
50–65 lat, korpulentna  
💰 350 zł brutto/dzień  

🔹 11. Kurier (epizod niemy)  
Mężczyzna ok. 50 lat, wysoki, krępy  
💰 350 zł brutto/dzień  

🔹 12. Bezdomny (epizod niemy)  
Mężczyzna 40–65 lat, z bujną brodą  
💰 350 zł brutto/dzień  

🔹 13. Nadawca (epizod niemy)  
Mężczyzna 30–55 lat, raczej postawny, może być typ ochroniarza  
💰 350 zł brutto/dzień  

🔹 14. Policjant (epizod niemy)  
Funkcjonariusz / typ mundurowy  
💰 350 zł brutto/dzień  

📩 ZGŁOSZENIA:  
impresariat.kamedstudio@gmail.com  

➡️ W tytule: PILOT  

W zgłoszeniu prosimy o:  
1. Imię i nazwisko  
2. Miejsce zamieszkania  
3. Wiek  
4. Wzrost  
5. Rozmiar ubrania  
6. 2 zdjęcia (twarz + sylwetka, aktualne!)  
7. Link do wizytówki / nagrania (YouTube)  
8. Podaj numer roli do której się zgłaszasz
⏰ Zgłoszenia przyjmujemy do 01.05 do godz. 20:00  

Do zobaczenia na planie! 🎥

items.text:
Looking for an elderly 70-80 year old man to play the role of Grandpa Nick. He should have a look similar to of Robert De Niro- good physic, olive skin, a Mediterranean / Greek look. Very ethnic look. This role does not have any dialogue and would be to shoot one short scene.

scene. 

Also looking to cast a couple female actresses in the 30-40 age range to be background actors in one short scene. 

Synopsis:

Unforgettable is a story of a woman’s desperate attempt to get pregnant and on her journey, gets an unexpected message from her beloved Grandfather from the afterlife.

And how the signs along the way of her journey, whispered to her, what gifts would be put in her path. A true story of one woman’s synchronicity and love. 

PLEASE NOTE: this is a student film, it is no pay but all actors will receive IMDb credits. 

FILMING IN THE LOS ANGELES AREA.

sharedPost.text:
📢 THE REVOLUTION HAS A NAME: SODIES KASI TV! 🎬🔥
Meadowlands, the wait is over. We aren't just a channel; we are the heartbeat of the 10 Zones. We are the lens of the youth, the voice of the hustle, and the home of the untold story.

⚠️ THE REALITY CHECK (Building from Zero)
We want to be 100% transparent with our community. We are a Grassroots Startup proving that you don't need a million-rand budget to have a billion-rand vision.

NO Professional Tools: We use our smartphones and our brains. 📱🧠

NO Big Budget: We are fueled by pure passion and Kasi discipline. 💸❌

NO Physical Building: The streets of Ndofaya are our studio. 🏘️🛣️
If we can start with nothing, you have no excuse to stay still!

📺 OUR PRODUCTION LINEUP (The Sodies Slate)
We are currently filming and scouting for the following shows:

MEADOWLANDS HEART & THE BLOOD COIN: Our flagship dramas. Raw, high-tension storytelling.

KASI SOUL SESSION: A safe space to vent, confess, or share your "Glow-Up" story. (Anonymity respected).

THE HUSTLE PROFILE: Highlighting the entrepreneurs of the 10 Zones.

JUNIOR QUIZ REVOLUTION: 15 Learners competing for the title of the smartest in the Kasi. 🧠🏆

KASI NEWS & YOUTH VOICE: The headlines that matter to us, by us.

THE STAGE: Showcasing DJs, Producers, Poets, and Dancers. 🎧✍️

🚀 HOW TO JOIN THE MOVEMENT
1. FOR ACTORS & CREW (The Founding 40):
We are looking for raw talent, not just resumes. If you have the heart to build this with us, apply below.
👉 APPLY HERE: [https://form.svhrt.com/69b5fc522ac0ef04c5970eab]

2. FOR THE SOUL SESSION (Vents & Confessions):

items.text:
CASTING CALL!

Hello currently casting for a SAG-AFTRA short film “Let Him Play”

In need of the following roles:

Ryan (18)

Neurodivergent, sensitive, observant, and full

of unexpected wonder. His quirks include

tapping, wiping his nose, headphones on, masking

an extraordinary ear for music that no one has ever nurtured.

Julie (50)

A loving mother suffocated by a

failing marriage. She believes in her

boys but is trapped in survival mode.

Please send headshots and info to [lethimplayinfo@gmail.com](mailto:lethimplayinfo@gmail.com)

And we will send you instructions for self tape!

Shooting near LA in Lancaster June 27th and 28th!

items.text:
🎭 Question for actors ready to build a working career (not just train)?
Hi everyone, my name is Freya Tingley. I’m an actress who has worked on international film and television projects, including two Netflix series. I starred in Jersey Boys (directed by Clint Eastwood) and played Wendy Darling on Once Upon a Time.

I’ve been amazed and grateful by the wave of interest and messages recently. It’s been amazing connecting with so many of you.

I’m now offering something I wish existed when I was starting out:

A 2-hour, 1:1 career mentorship session over Zoom.

One of the biggest frustrations I hear is this:
Actors are told “get an agent” but then once they have one, nothing happens.
And for many actors, the challenge is figuring out how to get an agent in the first place.

This session is designed for both.

We sit down and go through:
• What actually makes an actor book work (beyond just talent)
• How to position yourself to attract the right representation
• What to focus on if you don’t yet have an agent
• The materials you really need and what most actors get wrong
• How to approach auditions and self-tapes strategically
• Building a career that moves forward, not just sideways

You’ll leave with a clear, personalised plan so you’re not stuck wondering when the next audition is coming or why you’re not booking. You’ll know exactly what steps to take to create the career you want. 

If you’ve been feeling stuck or unsure, feel free to message me for details or to book.

items.text:
Please join me on Wednesday, May 20, 2026 from 3:30 to 6:00 for Women in Film & Video New England
monthly meeting where I will be holding an Open Call for Actors!

I am currently casting Non-Union Actors and Real People in a series of PSA’s for a Nonprofit Healthcare Organization.

I am looking for a wide variety of people from all walks of life 18+!

I will also be happy to see Union actors and make sure I have them in my database!!

I offer “boutique” casting services to my clients.  I do all the casting personally.

I am an actor and director and establishing relationships with actors and directors is very important to me.

Seeing an actor in person is so important and I am excited to have this opportunity!!

See you there!!

Big Thanks to Tai Bacani for welcoming me!! 

🎉🎉🎉🎉🎉🎉🎉🎉🎉🎉🎉

✨BIG NEWS, FILM FRIENDS ✨

We’re switching things up for our next WIFVNE Brew Networking Night… and you are going to LOVE it.

📍 New Location: Shannon View Inn
🍻 Same amazing community
🎬 Even MORE opportunity

We are SO excited to share that Jodi Purdy Casting Director will be joining us LIVE for an in-person open call for actors 🎭

Yes… you read that right.
Come ready. Come confident. Come as YOU.

Whether you’re an actor, filmmaker, writer, or just looking to connect with creative, like-minded people—this is your night.

Let’s build, collaborate, and create magic together 💫

items.summary:
Please join me on Wednesday, May 20, 2026 from 3:30 to 6:00 for Women in Film & Video New England
monthly meeting where I will be holding an Open Call for Actors!

I am currently casting Non-Union Actors and Real People in a series of PSA’s for a Nonprofit Healthcare Organization.

I am looking for a wide variety of people from all walks of life 18+!

I will also be happy to see Union actors and make sure I have them in my database!!

I offer “boutique” casting services to my clients.  I do all the casting personally.

I am an actor and director and establishing relationships with actors and directors is very important to me.

Seeing an actor in person is so important and I am excited to have this opportunity!!

See you there!!

Big Thanks to Tai Bacani for welcoming me!! 

🎉🎉🎉🎉🎉🎉🎉🎉🎉🎉🎉

✨BIG NEWS, FILM FRIENDS ✨

We’re switching things up for our next WIFVNE Brew Networking Night… and you are going to LOVE it.

📍 New Location: Shannon View Inn
🍻 Same amazing community
🎬 Even MORE opportunity

We are SO excited to share that Jodi Purdy Casting Director will be joining us LIVE for an in-person open call for actors 🎭

Yes… you read that right.
Come ready. Come confident. Come as YOU.

Whether you’re an actor, filmmaker, writer, or just looking to connect with creative, like-minded people—this is your night.

Let’s build, collaborate, and create magic together 💫

CASTING CALL | RUNNERS | S27

We’re casting runners for a photo + video shoot for a major running brand. We need intermediate, advanced, and elite runners age 18+ across all identities. Experience with road running and good running form required. 

Pay is $2,000 for 1 day of work in New York, NY between Thu 5/28 - Wed 6/3 (1 day, TBD) with a fitting on Wed 5/27 or Tue 6/2. Must be 18+ and live in NY. Must disclose your talent agency if applicable. The advertiser’s name will be disclosed prior to booking if you are offered a role. 

We are also casting extras for this project! We need people ages 18-70 across all identities, pay is $500/day. See link for more info! 

TO APPLY:  https://www.weeblemountain.com/opencastingcalls/s27-runners

DON’T FIT THIS ROLE? Sign up for general consideration at https://weeblemountain.com/signup | We specialize in real people casting.

items.text:
**TELUS STORYHIVE SHORT FILM - CASTING CALL **

**UBCP ULB - PAID HONORARIUM **

**"A PART OF ME"**

**Director:** Tristan Miura

**Producers:** Allison Ham, Caylee Watrin 

**Category:** Indie Short Film - Produced by Telus Storyhive

**Casting Director:** Cathy Huynh 

**Union Status:** UBCP ULB 

**Compensation:** Paid Honorarium (see rates below). Food/crafty provided. Copy of film. IMDB credit.

**Filming Dates/Location:** July 3-6, 2026  / Vancouver, BC

**SUBMISSION INSTRUCTIONS:** Please email **ch17.film@gmail.com** with the subject heading [Your Name - Role Name] and include your headshot/photo, resume and demo reel (if applicable). 

**LOGLINE: **After suffering a double kidney failure during his semi-final baseball game, a Japanese-Canadian teenager begins to experience memories that aren’t his, and must uncover the truth behind his donor in order to heal. 

***OPEN TO NON-ACTORS - NO PREVIOUS ACTING EXPERIENCE REQUIRED***

**MILES - *****Character portrayed is Male, Mixed Japanese, 14-18***

Miles is the product of his environment. Growing up without a father meant growing up fast, but that doesn’t mean he doesn’t have the same struggles as any other teenager. Miles loves to be active, explore and learn, especially when it comes to baseball. He is always the first person to show up and the last to leave because being alone means sitting with himself. When he is suddenly stuck at home recovering from his kidney transplant, Miles must confront who he is and where he comes from. **LEAD ($100/day)**

**JENNIFER - *****Character portrayed is Female, White, 40-50 ***

Jennifer is a mother above all else, even if it means putting her own needs to the side. When it comes to Miles, she is constantly stuck between trying to do what is best and constantly second guessing if she is doing it right. Since Miles’ father’s passing, she’s done her best to be both a Mom and a Dad, but deep down she always feels like she will never be enough. She doesn’t know how to talk about Miles’ dad, which adds an invisible tension to their relationship. When Miles gets sick, she will do anything to make sure he gets better.** LEAD ($100/day)**

**NATASHA - *****Character portrayed is Female, Mixed Japanese, 20-30***

Natasha is an only child who was brought up to be well mannered but to always stand up for herself. Her mother passed away when she was young and so growing up she was extremely close with her father Takeo. She understands what it means to hurt, because of her mother’s passing, which allows her to empathize with everyone she meets. Her intelligence not only lives in her emotional maturity but also in her intellect. Despite this, she believes the world works in mysterious ways, even when it comes to her father’s passing. **SUPPORTING ($50/day)**

**TAKEO - *****Character portrayed is Male, Japanese, 14-18***

Takeo is a first generation immigrant to Canada having moved from Japan 3 years before the War. Takeo loved baseball and dreamed of going pro. When he was interned Takeo would play baseball as an escape from the world, so when he notices Kiyoshi showing interest in his favourite sport he decides to take him under his wing. Takeo is loyal, showing love through honesty and kindness rather than false niceties. **SMALL SUPPORTING. *REAL BASEBALL EXPERIENCE AN ASSET ($50/day)**

**KIYOSHI - *****Character portrayed is Male, Japanese, 6-10***

Kiyoshi was only a child during the Second World War and his time in internment shifted his life forever. He loves baseball and looks up to all the players at Tashme. In spite of his incarceration, he still dreams of becoming a pro player. **SMALL SUPPORTING ($50/day)**

**JOYCIE - *****Character portrayed is Female, Japanese, 25-35***

Kiyoshi’s mom, Joycie, is a loving parent. She does her best to take care of children, despite them being interned. Her husband has been placed into forced labour of the Princeton highway and is rarely able to see them. She does her best to look out for not only her children, but all the other kids at Tashme. **1 line, 1 scene ($50/day)**

**UMP - *****Character portrayed is Male, Open Ethnicity, 30-50***

This umpire watches each pitch closely and calls the game with clear, authoritative “STRIKE” calls. Remains focused and impartial throughout the baseball. 2 lines, 1 scene. ***REAL BASEBALL EXPERIENCE AN ASSET ($50/day)**

**CATCHER - *****Character portrayed is Male, Open Ethnicity, 15-20***

This teenage catcher receives each pitch cleanly and taunts Miles quietly, trying to get in his head during the baseball game. Confident and slightly cocky, but stays locked into the play. 1 line, 1 scene. ***REAL BASEBALL EXPERIENCE AN ASSET. ($50/day)**

**EMT/DOCTOR/NURSE - *****Character portrayed is Open Gender, Open Ethnicity, 30-50***

This EMT/DOCTOR/NURSE rushes to get Miles into surgery at the hospital. **1 line (each), 1 scene ($50/day)**

**ADULT KIYOSHI (PHOTO DOUBLE) - *****Character portrayed is Male, Japanese, 30-50***

While Jennifer and Miles look through their family photo album, they find a photograph of Kiyoshi, standing proudly in front of their house. **($50/day)**

**Casting Director:** Cathy Huynh 

**Union Status:** UBCP ULB 

**Compensation:** Paid Honorarium (see rates below). Food/crafty provided. Copy of film. IMDB credit.

**Filming Dates/Location:** July 3-6, 2026  / Vancouver, BC

**SUBMISSION INSTRUCTIONS:** Please email **ch17.film@gmail.com** with the subject heading [Your Name - Role Name] and include your headshot/photo, resume and demo reel (if applicable). 

**LOGLINE: **After suffering a double kidney failure during his semi-final baseball game, a Japanese-Canadian teenager begins to experience memories that aren’t his, and must uncover the truth behind his donor in order to heal. 

***OPEN TO NON-ACTORS - NO PREVIOUS ACTING EXPERIENCE REQUIRED***

**MILES - *****Character portrayed is Male, Mixed Japanese, 14-18***

Miles is the product of his environment. Growing up without a father meant growing up fast, but that doesn’t mean he doesn’t have the same struggles as any other teenager. Miles loves to be active, explore and learn, especially when it comes to baseball. He is always the first person to show up and the last to leave because being alone means sitting with himself. When he is suddenly stuck at home recovering from his kidney transplant, Miles must confront who he is and where he comes from. **LEAD ($100/day)**

**JENNIFER - *****Character portrayed is Female, White, 40-50 ***

Jennifer is a mother above all else, even if it means putting her own needs to the side. When it comes to Miles, she is constantly stuck between trying to do what is best and constantly second guessing if she is doing it right. Since Miles’ father’s passing, she’s done her best to be both a Mom and a Dad, but deep down she always feels like she will never be enough. She doesn’t know how to talk about Miles’ dad, which adds an invisible tension to their relationship. When Miles gets sick, she will do anything to make sure he gets better.** LEAD ($100/day)**

**NATASHA - *****Character portrayed is Female, Mixed Japanese, 20-30***

Natasha is an only child who was brought up to be well mannered but to always stand up for herself. Her mother passed away when she was young and so growing up she was extremely close with her father Takeo. She understands what it means to hurt, because of her mother’s passing, which allows her to empathize with everyone she meets. Her intelligence not only lives in her emotional maturity but also in her intellect. Despite this, she believes the world works in mysterious ways, even when it comes to her father’s passing. **SUPPORTING ($50/day)**

**TAKEO - *****Character portrayed is Male, Japanese, 14-18***

Takeo is a first generation immigrant to Canada having moved from Japan 3 years before the War. Takeo loved baseball and dreamed of going pro. When he was interned Takeo would play baseball as an escape from the world, so when he notices Kiyoshi showing interest in his favourite sport he decides to take him under his wing. Takeo is loyal, showing love through honesty and kindness rather than false niceties. **SMALL SUPPORTING. *REAL BASEBALL EXPERIENCE AN ASSET ($50/day)**

**KIYOSHI - *****Character portrayed is Male, Japanese, 6-10***

Kiyoshi was only a child during the Second World War and his time in internment shifted his life forever. He loves baseball and looks up to all the players at Tashme. In spite of his incarceration, he still dreams of becoming a pro player. **SMALL SUPPORTING ($50/day)**

**JOYCIE - *****Character portrayed is Female, Japanese, 25-35***

Kiyoshi’s mom, Joycie, is a loving parent. She does her best to take care of children, despite them being interned. Her husband has been placed into forced labour of the Princeton highway and is rarely able to see them. She does her best to look out for not only her children, but all the other kids at Tashme. **1 line, 1 scene ($50/day)**

**UMP - *****Character portrayed is Male, Open Ethnicity, 30-50***

This umpire watches each pitch closely and calls the game with clear, authoritative “STRIKE” calls. Remains focused and impartial throughout the baseball. 2 lines, 1 scene. ***REAL BASEBALL EXPERIENCE AN ASSET ($50/day)**

**CATCHER - *****Character portrayed is Male, Open Ethnicity, 15-20***

This teenage catcher receives each pitch cleanly and taunts Miles quietly, trying to get in his head during the baseball game. Confident and slightly cocky, but stays locked into the play. 1 line, 1 scene. ***REAL BASEBALL EXPERIENCE AN ASSET. ($50/day)**

**EMT/DOCTOR/NURSE - *****Character portrayed is Open Gender, Open Ethnicity, 30-50***

This EMT/DOCTOR/NURSE rushes to get Miles into surgery at the hospital. **1 line (each), 1 scene ($50/day)**

**ADULT KIYOSHI (PHOTO DOUBLE) - *****Character portrayed is Male, Japanese, 30-50***

While Jennifer and Miles look through their family photo album, they find a photograph of Kiyoshi, standing proudly in front of their house. **($50/day)**

sharedPost.text:
AUDITION NOTICE: Barefoot in the Park

Barefoot in the Park by Neil Simon follows Paul and Corie Bratter, a pair of newlyweds moving into their first apartment in 1960s Greenwich Village. The honeymoon phase is quickly tested by a tiny, top-floor walk-up with no heat, a hole in the skylight, and a cast of eccentric neighbours. As Paul’s straight-laced legal mind clashes with Corie’s spontaneous, free-spirited nature, the couple must navigate their first major marital spat and decide if they can truly walk "barefoot in the park" together.

Creative Team:        Director: Julianne Christie          Producers: Janet Ellis, Michele Partridge

Production Details:
Audition Date: May 20, 2026
Audition & Performance Location: Peninsula Studio Theatre, 14600 North Bluff Rd, White Rock, BC
Rehearsals: Specific Dates TBD. June – September 2026
Performance Dates: September 17 – 27, 2026
Compensation: Actor Honorarium provided.
Perks: Free parking and food/refreshments provided at all rehearsals.

Character Breakdown:
Corie Bratter (Lead, Female, 20s to 30s): A free-spirited, optimistic newlywed who sees the world through rose-colored glasses. Must have high energy and excellent comedic timing.
Paul Bratter (Lead, Male, 20s–30s): HAS BEEN CAST
Ethel Banks (Supporting, Female, 40s–60s): Corie’s cautious and slightly weary mother. She finds herself on an unexpected adventure thanks to her daughter.
Victor Velasco (Supporting, Male, 40s–60s): The eccentric, colourful, and flirtatious neighbour from the attic. A larger-than-life character.
Telephone Repairman (Supporting, Open Age/Male): A grounded character who gets a front-row seat to the Bratters' domestic chaos.
Delivery Person (Supporting, Open Age/Male): A comedic role focused on the physical toll of climbing those six flights of stairs.

**Submission Instructions:
Please email your headshot and resume to: Janet Ellis, Executive Director, janet@peninsulaproductions.org
Selection Process: Sides and a specific audition time will be emailed to those selected to audition on May 20.
Deadline: Please submit your materials promptly for consideration.

We look forward to hearing from you!

TV Producers are searching for polyamorous and poly-curious people to star in their own TV Docu-series!

* *Are you in a relationship and are curious about exploring polyamory?*
* *Are you already in a polyamorous relationship?*

 

Whether you’re part of an existing **THROUPLE, QUAD, or PENTAD** OR you’re **newly exploring polyamory,***** WE WANT TO HEAR FROM YOU!***

**To be considered or to nominate a family, please email polytvcasting@gmail.com with the following info:**

1. Your Name(s) and Location.

2. Contact info.

3. Tell us a little bit about your family and your lives.

4. Attach some family photos.

5. Include any social media links that can help us get to know you better.

Wir suchen dich! Arktos (m/w/d) !

Das Musical der Schwaben-Bühne e.V. wird im Oktober im alten Kino Bissingen erneut eine Wiederaufnahme spielen.
Nach 10 ausverkauften Vorstellungen soll unser Kinder- und Erwachsenen Musical neuen Flair bekommen und uns in Bissingen eine neue Spielstätte schaffen.

Hast du Lust für den guten Zweck auf die Bühne zu gehen ?
Und das in einem tollen Team?
Dann melde dich einfach bei uns ! 
Tabaluga-schwabenbuehne@gmx.de 
Wir freuen uns auf dich!

items.text:
Du hast Bock in einem Musikvideo mitzuspielen? Dann lese weiter. Es geht um das neue Lied von mir - Sie rebelliert. Wir mieten uns für den Dreh eine Location - welche genau verhandeln wir noch. Aber im Raum Lüneburg (21337)

Zur Zeit stehen wir mit mehreren Agenturen/Firmen in Kontakt und der Song wird auch live auf Auftritten performt. Heißt - er wird Reichweite schlagen. 

Bei dem Dreh geht es schlicht und einfach ums Feiern 

In dem Video performe ich den Song in der Location während im Hintergrund kräftig gefeiert werden soll. 

Stehtische mit Flaschen drauf , Dekoration , passende Beleuchtung und viele Leute - wie man es aus dem Club kennt  

Dabei soll immer zwischen den Szenen der Performance und den Feiernden gewechselt werden. 

Als kleine Übersicht :

* Geschlecht : männlich/weiblich 

* ⁠Alter : zwischen 18-27 Jahren 

* ⁠Kleidung : schlicht/modern ( wie man feiern geht ) 

* ⁠Wann ? 28.06. oder 05.07.

* ⁠Wo ? Lüneburg oder näherer Umkreis - genaue Location verhandeln wir noch 

* ⁠Erfahrung ? Nicht zwingend erforderlich, wir erklären dir vorweg alles ganz genau. 

* ⁠Was sollst du machen ? Den Song in einigen Szenen mitsingen und Feiern - mehr nicht.

Deine Vorteile : 

* Alle Fotos und Videos die entstehen bekommst du für eigene Zwecke auch mit. 

* ⁠Nach dem Dreh machen wir mit jedem von euch ein kleines Fotoshooting für eure Zwecke - auf Wunsch auch Videos für Reels.

* ⁠Du nimmst einiges an Erfahrung mit und hast die Möglichkeit dich mit interessanten Leuten zu connecten ( Fotografen , einige Künstler unserer Crew und lokalen Medien) 

* ⁠Der Abend ist für dich komplett umsonst ( Fotos, Videos , Getränke ) 

* ⁠Auf Wunsch markieren wir dich auf unseren Social Media Kanälen und Plattformen 

* ⁠Du bekommst während der Bearbeitung immer ein Update zu dem aktuellen Stand von dem Video - wir laden nichts einfach so irgendwo hoch  

Sei dir bitte vorher bewusst das wir entstandenes Material weiter verarbeiten und das fertige Video auf einigen Social Media Kanälen sowie auf YouTube veröffentlicht und kräftig beworben wird. 

Also wenn du Bock hast was zu bewegen melde dich privat bei mir. 

Genaueres besprechen wir privat.

* optional : Für die Vereinfachung der Planung besteht die Möglichkeit unserer WhatsApp Gruppe beizutreten. 

Reden kann jeder - wir machen! 

Wir freuen uns auf coole Leute :)

LÜNEBURG ODER NÄHERER UMKREIS LOCATION KLÄRT SICH NOCH KLEIDUNGSSTIL SCHLICHT/MODERN /MODERN WIE MAN EBEN FEIERN GEHT ERFAHRUNG :NICHT ERFORDERLICH WIR GEHEN ALLES IN RUHE MIT DIR DURCH UND ERKLÄREN DIR ALLES AS MUSST DU MACHEN? FEIERN!'

What a fantastic group of singers, voice teachers and speech therapists you are! 🙌
Today we worked intensively on larynx height, AES, cricoid and thyroid tilt, jaw and lip movement, and anchoring – and I’m already looking forward to the next days together.

Stimmtraining in Frankfurt am Main – online & vor Ort 🎤💻 | Estill Voice Training – Level 1 🎶

Today we dove furthermore into the fascinating world of voice anatomy, practical aspects and acoustics. Alongside all the theory, there was plenty of practice, exchange, and shared learning – with joy, curiosity, and lots of aha moments guaranteed ✨

I’m really excited for Day 4 and 5 with you 🥳
Here’s to new insights, exciting exercises, and your continued vocal growth 💪🎤💫

📌Stimmtraining Anmeldung im Institut Rummel (Frankfurt), in Luxemburg oder Online
